name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Today you have a very special chance

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm789ige4ft0fa7lj0lg2hsd4lvmm2bcia5aijd0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z63fsmikfn01293p9eblmnmt9o11cbt2li6f5otg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zunigmqa4p1l4qia91pj3q1v28vnjf39godvpue0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn8lg43m526oqrscdqop0lrdeoro35prvnu91270_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zij7cc1hupl6bn59t73j4on6hnccq0og9h6pmmc8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrnjjnu35sl2mk8s70d2hhg282ofm4ko944umjqo_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z18hik5m8dvmlaq8j9v6702miuq286afb8ahiv90_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zol97lpk89sfbh0obr7k1rrn5272vpk37qp8qot8_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j60o32c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Roy Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: Will you add your name to personally endorse my campaign today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to reach out to you specifically, Peter.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
| | | |
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/endorse-cooper-2026-email-v2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=5&source=email_pet_pros_jtk404&t=8&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
Peter,

I’m Roy Cooper, and I’m the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. Today, I wanted to reach out to you specifically not to ask for a contribution – but instead, to share a bit more about myself and ask for your personal endorsement in this race.
**[If you’re already all in to flip North Carolina blue and take back the Senate, please add your name now to help us build the grassroots movement we need to win.](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/endorse-cooper-2026-email-v2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=5&source=email_pet_pros_jtk404&t=9&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)**
Otherwise, let me explain why your support, and your signature today, is so important.

I’ve spent my life serving the people of North Carolina.
As Governor, I expanded Medicaid to hundreds of thousands of hardworking people and fought for better health care. As Attorney General, I protected working families from fraud and abuse. As a State Legislator, I pushed for policies that made everyday people’s lives easier.
**But before all of this, I was just a boy from Nash County – the son of a public school teacher who tried to do right by his family, friends and neighbors.**
Now, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’ve seen what’s possible when government actually puts people first. When those in power lead with a sense of duty, purpose and moral clarity. That’s not happening in Washington DC right now, and we have to change that.
**[The path to retaking the Senate majority for Democrats runs straight through North Carolina – and with a recent poll showing this race statistically tied, we can win but not without a powerful grassroots team behind me. So please, will you add your name to personally endorse my campaign?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/endorse-cooper-2026-email-v2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=5&source=email_pet_pros_jtk404&t=10&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/endorse-cooper-2026-email-v2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&source=email_pet_d_jtk404&t=11&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
---
Every signature is an act of faith in the movement we’re building together. Thank you.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.
_

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)
_If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, _[submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=1201%2E124072%2EPPOzhO)_

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: I know, I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

This is another fundraising email.

I know, I know... I doubt you’ve been eagerly checking your inbox for this!
Trust me, I don’t love sending them either.

If you’ll give me a minute, I want to explain why they matter for what
we’re trying to build together.

I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from
corporate PACs or AIPAC, and never will.

The upside to that is I get to fight for what working people actually
want: Medicare for All, abolishing ICE, and using our taxpayer dollars to
improve life here rather than fund endless war overseas.

The downside is that I have to be constantly fundraising. Consistent
grassroots donations to emails like this are the only way a 100%
people-powered campaign like ours can compete.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260426-1-ak.Ug2ftH&amount=10&refcode=em20260426-2059&t=1004&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ ]So if you’re able to, can you pitch in $10 to give our
campaign a little more fuel to host events, run ads, and build a winning
coalition across Michigan?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260426-1-ak.Ug2ftH&amount=10&refcode=em20260426-2059&t=1005&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ ]Donate $10 ››

Peter, we’re
in a moment where this race can still go either way.

The latest polling has us narrowly in the lead — but with so many
undecided voters, that lead isn’t guaranteed.

If we slow down even for a second, the AIPAC-backed candidate will have
every opportunity to flood this race with money and catch up fast.

So yeah, I know these emails can be a little annoying. But they’re also
how we protect what we’ve built and keep moving forward.

I don’t expect you to give every time. But if you can today, it would make
a real difference. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260426-1-ak.Ug2ftH&amount=10&refcode=em20260426-2059&t=1006&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ ]Donate $10 or any amount today:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260426-1-ak.Ug2ftH&amount=10&refcode=em20260426-2059&t=1025&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

P.S. Even I get our campaign texts! 😅

[ Abdul ]Abdul holding up his phone, which has a text from the campaign on it

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this help us stay connected with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for taking the time to read this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1026&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1027&akid=2066%2E251025%2EXPixHQ

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com
Volunteer: https://go.abdulforsenate.com/join

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

If we slow down even for a second, the AIPAC-backed candidate will have every opportunity to flood this race with money and catch up fast. So yeah, I know these emails can be a little annoying. But they’re also how we protect what we’ve built and keep moving forward. I don’t expect you to give every time. But if you can today, it would make a real difference. [ ]Donate $10 or any amount today: [ ]Donate $10 ›› Your friend in the fight, Abdul P.S. Even I get our campaign texts! 😅 [ Abdul ]Abdul holding up his phone, which has a text from the campaign on it

**April 26: A personal note from Gabby Giffords to you.**

**Please don’t click away from this message.** Today is Sunday, April 26, and our big end-of-month fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching. Unfortunately, we are falling short of our fundraising goal.
If you are tired of the endless bad headlines about gun violence — and you are ready to do something about it — please join the 2% of supporters who are pitching in to end the gun violence epidemic in America.
When I founded GIFFORDS more than a decade ago, many warned me that the gun lobby was too difficult to take on. Now, gun safety is a winning issue...thanks to donors and supporters like you.
GIFFORDS relies on the support of people like you to help advance our cause in the courts and in state legislatures, and to get the message out widely when Republicans overstep.
[**So while you probably didn't wake up this morning and think you were going to make a donation to GIFFORDS, that's what I am asking you to do.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q22026.j3JysD&refcode=em260426-1-b&t=2&akid=11418%2E3935704%2EEmLiCj)
Any contribution goes a long way. Thank you.
Gabby Giffords

name: Team Demand Justice PAC
subject: The quiet takeover you’re not hearing about:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260426-61391&t=1001&akid=61391%2E1407376%2EpBAQnG ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260426-61391&t=1002&akid=61391%2E1407376%2EpBAQnG ]Demand Justice PAC

Let’s be
clear about what’s happening right now: Donald Trump is trying to rig the
system.

Not by convincing voters or winning on the merits — but by weaponizing the
Department of Justice.

The DOJ is supposed to be independent. Instead, it’s being pulled into a
dangerous role: pressuring states, demanding sensitive voter data, and
inserting itself into elections across the country.

This is how our democracy gets dismantled from the inside out.

You don’t need to overturn democracy overnight when you can chip away at
it by targeting the systems that people rely on to trust election
outcomes, intimidating officials, and bending federal authority to serve
political goals.

It’s corruption, plain and simple. And it’s designed to tilt the playing
field in favor of the powerful before a single vote is even cast.

Demand Justice PAC exists to confront this kind of abuse head-on. We’re
exposing it, tracking it, and organizing against it — but we can’t match
this level of coordinated power without support from this team.

name: Nancy Lacore
subject: I’m concerned about Pete Hegseth.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Hi there, it’s Nancy Lacore, the Democrat running to flip South Carolina’s First District.
I have a lot of thoughts about what’s been going on with Pete Hegseth.
Not only did he remove me from my position as Chief of the Navy Reserve after 35 years of service, but he’s actively undermining the foundation of our military.
Hegseth has fired more than a dozen senior military officers, including an Army chief of staff and two other generals who were ousted recently.
And now, he’s waging a war with Iran that could put our national security and countless American lives on the line.
That kind of behavior isn’t just destabilizing – it’s dangerous.
Now more than ever, we need leadership that’s rooted in honor, service, and respect. And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s First District.
If we’re going to flip this seat and take back a Democratic House Majority, I need your help. Can you make a split donation of $25 or whatever you can, to Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
I’ll be honest, folks, I’m concerned.
While global tensions rise, the last thing we need is reckless leadership that’s willing to gamble with American lives.
We need steady, experienced leaders who are focused on delivering results – not inciting chaos, playing political games, and putting their own interests above the nation’s.
And I’m running for Congress to restore that kind of leadership – but we have a long road ahead of us to flip this seat and restore some accountability to Washington.
This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and it could decide control of the House. So I need all hands on deck to win. So I have to humbly ask: Will you split $25 today to support Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT MAGA! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
With my deepest respect and gratitude,
RADM Nancy Lacore

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: This is where Democrats think they can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moody for Florida
body:
Democrats have been quietly overperforming in these races, even in areas Republicans should be dominating.

| | | | Friend, I’ve won a few elections in my day, and I’ve spent decades watching battles for control of Congress. I’ve learned how to recognize when control of the Senate is truly on the line – and I believe we are at one of those moments now. **I’ve zeroed in on Florida as the one state that could decide everything.** What’s unfolding there is not getting nearly enough attention — but it should be setting off alarm bells for every conservative paying close attention. _**I’ve put together a confidential briefing explaining exactly why this race is so critical, and what Democrats are already doing behind the scenes to exploit it.**_ [**Please give it a read ASAP:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg1r22ivalgf3lf4iketahge9ohrubnv38njpcao_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j68oj0chh2bs)
---
[READ MY REPORT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6kmne42oq1nr6993cchto7uh1grq4s5lrc4r570_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j68oj0chh2bs)
---
Republicans have a STRONG candidate running in Florida – but this isn’t a typical race. It’s a special election to fill Marco Rubio’s old seat, and that changes everything. **Democrats have been quietly overperforming in these races, even in areas Republicans should be dominating.** They see an opportunity in Florida, and they are going all-in. If they succeed, the consequences won’t be limited to one seat. It could hand them the power to block President Trump’s nominees, stall his agenda, and grind progress in Washington to a halt. [**That’s why I need you to read this very CAREFULLY, and very QUICKLY.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkkg00kugki3oll8t87fv9u219ebevbat19m4stg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c9j68oj0chh2bs) Because once you see the full picture, you’ll understand why this race may be the lynchpin for the entire Senate majority. If you wait to act, it could already be too late. Thank you, Newt Gingrich

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: voting scheme >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Under Trump’s SAVE Act, a driver’s license or military ID wouldn’t be enough to register to vote.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130204099/616972784/975344700?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.04.26_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RjMWNkMy04NDQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1cxYtXxEmkKd9vK1rffxAqaUfOkQBFXaTwqZs6jtVI=&emci=4b14168f-173f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=47dc1cd3-8441-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7659029) Trump’s so-called “SAVE America” Act is a dangerous attempt to make it harder for the American people to cast their ballots this November. [**_Will you add your name to our petition to stop the SAVE Act? We’re counting on 100 Democrats from your area to sign before midnight!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130204100/616972785/975344700?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.04.26_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RjMWNkMy04NDQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1cxYtXxEmkKd9vK1rffxAqaUfOkQBFXaTwqZs6jtVI=&emci=4b14168f-173f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=47dc1cd3-8441-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130204101/616972786/975344700?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.04.26_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RjMWNkMy04NDQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1cxYtXxEmkKd9vK1rffxAqaUfOkQBFXaTwqZs6jtVI=&emci=4b14168f-173f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=47dc1cd3-8441-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7659029)
---
Let’s be clear: under Trump’s SAVE Act, a driver’s license or military ID wouldn’t be enough to register to vote. It’s not even a voter ID law; it’s a blatant voter suppression law.
Trump is grasping at straws to suppress turnout to hold onto his slim majority. He knows that passing the SAVE Act and suppressing votes is the only way to push his dangerous agenda forward.
We have to block the SAVE Act in Congress, but Republicans will ALWAYS bow down to Trump’s demands unless we show them just how UNPOPULAR the SAVE Act is.
[**_Folks, we need 100 local Democrats to add their name to our petition to stop the SAVE Act. Without enough signatures, Republicans will pass this bill and ruin our chances in November!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130204102/616972787/975344700?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.04.26_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RjMWNkMy04NDQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1cxYtXxEmkKd9vK1rffxAqaUfOkQBFXaTwqZs6jtVI=&emci=4b14168f-173f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=47dc1cd3-8441-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7659029)
| [ADD MY NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130204103/616972790/975344700?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.04.26_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RjMWNkMy04NDQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1cxYtXxEmkKd9vK1rffxAqaUfOkQBFXaTwqZs6jtVI=&emci=4b14168f-173f-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=47dc1cd3-8441-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7659029)

name: Polling Update via Our Revolution
subject: The path to flip the Senate just opened up. Will you power our grassroots fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1011&refcode=email-20260426_v&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Nate Cohn of The New York Times just confirmed it: the Senate is
officially in play for the midterms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37854?source=email-20260426&t=1061&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]Headline: Why a Democratic Senate, Once Unthinkable, Is a Real
Possibility

For months, it seemed nearly impossible. Why? Because flipping the Senate
means winning not just purple battlegrounds, but tough, deep-red districts
and states that Trump won in a landslide.

But something seismic is shifting with Democrats leading or tied in the
races for four GOP seats – enough to win the Senate – with possible pickup
opportunities in Iowa and Texas. These are states where Our
Revolution-endorsed working-class champions like Graham Platner and James
Talarico are running ground-up, people-powered races – and we’re right
there with them.

Right now, all these races are INCREDIBLY tight. So we’re going big in red
and rural districts, hiring organizers and growing our 100,000 strong
Citizen Action Team. And we need you with us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20260426nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]If you care about stopping Trump’s agenda in its tracks and taking on the
special interests that have corrupted Washington for generations, NOW is
the time to act. Can you chip in $15, $27, or whatever you can to help
power the grassroots to flip the Senate?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Let’s be clear: this WILL NOT be easy. The Republican Party is already
flooding these races with cash – and they have a MAJOR edge, stockpiling
$843 million for attack ads and dirty tricks compared to Democrats’ $243
million. That’s a staggering $600 MILLION advantage.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37854?source=email-20260426&t=1060&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]Headline: Republicans have one midterm edge and its worth $600 million

We’re chipping away at their advantage with PEOPLE power. And we’re not
stopping at just flipping red seats. We’re also backing exciting primary
challengers who can grow the progressive wing of the Senate by taking out
corporate Democrats – people like Julie Gonzales in Colorado and Abdul
El-Sayed in Michigan.

Because the truth is we don’t just need to flip the Senate. We need enough
new leadership to make sure that when we DO win the Senate, it’s actually
willing to stand up against Trump and fight for the PEOPLE.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37832?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20260426nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10606%2E5885482%2E0e2aLc ]We’re ready to go all in to flip the Senate and elect enough working class
champions to change the game. But we can’t close the cash gap without you.
If you’re fired up about building a Senate ready to take on Trump, chip in
now.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: MAJOR updates out of Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Last year, election watchers were writing off Ohio. Now, everything has changed...
#

**This is a quick update about what’s happening in Ohio.** **[If you’re ready to help us elect Democrats in Ohio + similar states across the country, please consider making a donation of whatever you can right away.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103001?refcode=em20260426-10356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10356%2E614464%2EOwh9YD)** Otherwise, please keep reading...
---

Last year, election watchers were writing off Ohio. **Now, everything has changed...**
---

**This month,_Cook Political Report_ – one of the most reputable election raters in the country – upgraded Ohio’s U.S. Senate race TOWARD DEMOCRATS.** It went from... **Lean Republican → TOSS UP**
---

But it’s not all good news today, Peter... **After news of this upgrade went public, one of the BIGGEST national GOP groups in the country committed to spending nearly $80 MILLION to support the Republican running in this race – one of their biggest investments this year.**
---

**That’s why we’re coming to YOU today.** We DON’T need to match them dollar for dollar. But we DO need a surge of grassroots support to stand up to this GOP spending and build on the momentum we’re seeing in Ohio. **Will you help us do it, Peter?**

clean_body: Last year, election watchers were writing off Ohio. Now, everything has changed... This is a quick update about what’s happening in Ohio. Otherwise, please keep reading... Last year, election watchers were writing off Ohio. Now, everything has changed... This month,Cook Political Report – one of the most reputable election raters in the country – upgraded Ohio’s U.S. Senate race TOWARD DEMOCRATS. It went from... Lean Republican → TOSS UP But it’s not all good news today, Peter... After news of this upgrade went public, one of the BIGGEST national GOP groups in the country committed to spending nearly $80 MILLION to support the Republican running in this race – one of their biggest investments this year. That’s why we’re coming to YOU today. We DON’T need to match them dollar for dollar. But we DO need a surge of grassroots support to stand up to this GOP spending and build on the momentum we’re seeing in Ohio. Will you help us do it, Peter? With your support, we can elect Democrats in Ohio + all across the country this year – and stand up to the massive amounts of money the GOP will spend to keep their power. Friend, I’m proud to endorse incredible progressive candidates who will fight for our rights: **Eli Savit** for Attorney General, **Garlin Gilchrist** for Secretary of State, **Amir Makled** for University of Michigan Board of Regents, **Shereef Akeel** for Wayne State University Board of Governors, and **Tiffany Tilley** for State Board of Education. And last weekend, each won their Democratic Party Nomination and will appear on the ballot this November! **I created Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to elect candidates who will serve the people, not billionaire interests.** Candidates who will stand up to authoritarianism and fight back against attacks on our rights. [**If you already know that you’re with me, make a donation to Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today. **Eli Savit is running for Michigan Attorney General** and we’ve worked together for years to stand up for the people against the powerful. Eli has taken on the Trump administration, ICE, greedy banks, and corporate polluters and won! He’s never taken a dime of corporate PAC money.
**Garlin Gilchrist is running to be Michigan's next Secretary of State.** As our state’s Lieutenant Governor, he has stood up to corporate greed in our shared struggle for an economy that puts everyday people first. The highest-ranking Black elected official in Michigan history, he has helped expand affordable housing, and improved access to healthcare and mental health services, and deliver free Pre-K.
**Tiffany Tilley is running for re-election to the State Board of Education.** As Co-Vice President of the Board, Tiffany has never shied away from advocating for our most vulnerable, consistently defending students’ rights, including every child’s fundamental right to read.
**Amir Makled is running for University of Michigan Board of Regents** and as a civil rights attorney he will use his voice to defend free speech and academic freedom, including students’ and faculty members’ right to speak out against injustice without fear of retaliation or surveillance.
**Shereef Akeel is running for Wayne State University Board of Governors.** He has won lawsuits against banks, Border Patrol, the Department of Homeland Security, and military corporations—and will use his background as a civil rights and human rights attorney to continue advocating for those who have been silenced, mistreated, and excluded from the American promise.
**In these times, when we see a fascist administration consistently making cuts, restrictions, and trying to turn back the clock, we need champions who will be unapologetic, unbossed, and relentless in advocating for our communities and speaking truth to power.**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Apr 25, 2026
Subject: These five amazing candidates are now Democratic Party nominees for their statewide races!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
There’s a sea change happening in the Democratic Party.
In Michigan, statewide nominees are elected at the state Democratic Party Nominating Convention. And we proudly supported five candidates with proven track records of standing up to authoritarianism and demanding our rights.
**So often, the political establishment and Big Money dominate party politics―on the state and federal level. But not this year!**
All five of our endorsed candidates won their nominations and are now headed to the general election. Read more about these amazing candidates below.
**I created Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to demand a politics that puts our communities first, not the billionaires and greedy corporations.**
[**In Michigan and across the country, we’re fighting to elect candidates who understand the needs of their communities and who will always put people over special interests. I have fought alongside **Eli Savit** for years as together we’ve taken on polluting corporations, greedy banks, ICE, and the Trump administration.
As the Washtenaw County Prosecutor, Eli has fought back against the Trump administration’s attacks on birthright citizenship, SNAP cuts, brutal ICE tactics, student visas, and attempts to send troops into our cities. He has also protected voting rights, free speech, and workers’ rights.
Eli supported Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison’s lawsuit against ICE. And back in 2021, Eli took the proactive step of ending his county’s collaboration with ICE.
Now, Eli is running to be the next Attorney General for the state of Michigan.
I’m also proud to support **Garlin Gilchrist** as Michigan's next Secretary of State. Garlin is the highest-ranking Black elected official in Michigan history, serving as our Lieutenant Governor. He’s never forgotten his roots; like me, he grew up in Detroit with a parent who worked in the auto industry.
Like me, Garlin stands up to corporate greed in our shared struggle for an economy that puts everyday people first. He’s played a leading role in delivering free Pre-K for all, expanding affordable housing, protecting abortion access, reforming our justice system, and improving access to healthcare and mental health services. He’s also connected tens of thousands of Michiganders to reliable, affordable, high-speed internet.
The Honorable **Tiffany Tilley** has never shied away from advocating for our most vulnerable while also raising the standard for how we invest in education. As the Co-Vice President of the State Board of Education, Tiffany isn’t just a leader in our state. She also sets an example nationally. That’s why, after just one meeting, she was appointed as the representative to the National Association of State Boards of Education.
Tiffany is running for re-election to the State Board of Education to continue advocating to give a voice to underserved populations; fight for increasing equitable funding in an age where so many shy away from Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion; push for more career and technical education programs; address gun violence; increase mental health support; and work to support foster youth across the state.
**Amir Makled** is a civil rights attorney running for University of Michigan Board of Regents. Other board members have prosecuted student protesters and capitulated to Trump. Meanwhile, Amir has provided free legal representation for student protesters.
We need Amir’s voice on the board of regents to defend free speech and academic freedom, including students’ and faculty’s right to speak out against injustice without fear of retaliation or surveillance.
**Shereef Akeel** is a civil rights and human rights attorney running for Wayne State University Board of Governors. Like me, he’s a child of immigrants. He has sued banks, discriminatory employers, Border Patrol, the Department of Homeland Security, and military corporations—and won. If he becomes a member of the Board of Governors, he’ll fight for students’ rights and inclusion at my alma mater.
**Each of these candidates exemplifies how public servants can serve their constituents, not big business and billionaire interests.**
[**Donate to Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today to power these candidates in their general elections and to elect candidates up and down the ballot, in Michigan and across the country, who will always put our communities’ needs first.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsYLHqvweOkHVR7NR0gklyP9vundd6sidw2FIxr1hXDZjaJpkk36Poz8LvGjWo_Wuo6wRv-PaUIkns6NqI_CaysSZMBU0hIqMekel4Fnzpxa7726SMmoCA4oH-zZlU86vLE6EcwferU0N_TQhvrXD3jezsUG6PisCIoSl0XAA6mBFTfIDBFqY9eE9Q3RcLCcNHMdbJSgNsGT1_LDEuct3Z4WN7mVqx9f8LC1jQiIn-dsJ4XlwphAKJRjGvqOwcp_R9VCzzz4bCSR9YUCXn2886zSf89OCr3BOdKt3uQslujyFOlxh44-YUxQd5oVRcaI-qdTxY5Kql3fN1klMBvzFwzH2nHH4NUYKmdtwDwF8BN6epyP7sXVcKOsMd4zbb4XAv-z-2sOES5lX8qEndG9qcVfLmIG4PjLvHbHwe1bcvQkN_oCb8tS_Cx_Kc3u6EQEBujwnhOeWHqFlgpPTumnPAck7Uebb8HyStBmEUW-EXmQQ/4q4/R4ToXDhiQQ-tFRurxNbIhw/h14/h001.ezl6oDEe57xBVJIH8fvkVlV0EZ5PXKwLP2sG4tL2g7Y)

clean_body: Each of these candidates exemplifies how public servants can serve their constituents, not big business and billionaire interests. | | | Friend, I’m proud to endorse incredible progressive candidates who will fight for our rights: Eli Savit for Attorney General, Garlin Gilchrist for Secretary of State, Amir Makled for University of Michigan Board of Regents, Shereef Akeel for Wayne State University Board of Governors, and Tiffany Tilley for State Board of Education. And last weekend, each won their Democratic Party Nomination and will appear on the ballot this November! I created Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to elect candidates who will serve the people, not billionaire interests. Candidates who will stand up to authoritarianism and fight back against attacks on our rights. | Eli Savit is running for Michigan Attorney General and we’ve worked together for years to stand up for the people against the powerful. Eli has taken on the Trump administration, ICE, greedy banks, and corporate polluters and won! He’s never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. Garlin Gilchrist is running to be Michigan's next Secretary of State. As our state’s Lieutenant Governor, he has stood up to corporate greed in our shared struggle for an economy that puts everyday people first. The highest-ranking Black elected official in Michigan history, he has helped expand affordable housing, and improved access to healthcare and mental health services, and deliver free Pre-K. Tiffany Tilley is running for re-election to the State Board of Education. As Co-Vice President of the Board, Tiffany has never shied away from advocating for our most vulnerable, consistently defending students’ rights, including every child’s fundamental right to read. Amir Makled is running for University of Michigan Board of Regents and as a civil rights attorney he will use his voice to defend free speech and academic freedom, including students’ and faculty members’ right to speak out against injustice without fear of retaliation or surveillance. Shereef Akeel is running for Wayne State University Board of Governors. He has won lawsuits against banks, Border Patrol, the Department of Homeland Security, and military corporations—and will use his background as a civil rights and human rights attorney to continue advocating for those who have been silenced, mistreated, and excluded from the American promise. In these times, when we see a fascist administration consistently making cuts, restrictions, and trying to turn back the clock, we need champions who will be unapologetic, unbossed, and relentless in advocating for our communities and speaking truth to power. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for fighting by my side for a future that puts our communities first, not greedy corporations or powerful special interests. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Apr 25, 2026 Subject: These five amazing candidates are now Democratic Party nominees for their statewide races! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, There’s a sea change happening in the Democratic Party. In Michigan, statewide nominees are elected at the state Democratic Party Nominating Convention. And we proudly supported five candidates with proven track records of standing up to authoritarianism and demanding our rights. So often, the political establishment and Big Money dominate party politics―on the state and federal level. But not this year! All five of our endorsed candidates won their nominations and are now headed to the general election. Read more about these amazing candidates below. I created Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to demand a politics that puts our communities first, not the billionaires and greedy corporations. I have fought alongside Eli Savit for years as together we’ve taken on polluting corporations, greedy banks, ICE, and the Trump administration. As the Washtenaw County Prosecutor, Eli has fought back against the Trump administration’s attacks on birthright citizenship, SNAP cuts, brutal ICE tactics, student visas, and attempts to send troops into our cities. He has also protected voting rights, free speech, and workers’ rights. Eli supported Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison’s lawsuit against ICE. And back in 2021, Eli took the proactive step of ending his county’s collaboration with ICE. Now, Eli is running to be the next Attorney General for the state of Michigan. I’m also proud to support Garlin Gilchrist as Michigan's next Secretary of State. Garlin is the highest-ranking Black elected official in Michigan history, serving as our Lieutenant Governor. He’s never forgotten his roots; like me, he grew up in Detroit with a parent who worked in the auto industry. Like me, Garlin stands up to corporate greed in our shared struggle for an economy that puts everyday people first. He’s played a leading role in delivering free Pre-K for all, expanding affordable housing, protecting abortion access, reforming our justice system, and improving access to healthcare and mental health services. He’s also connected tens of thousands of Michiganders to reliable, affordable, high-speed internet. The Honorable Tiffany Tilley has never shied away from advocating for our most vulnerable while also raising the standard for how we invest in education. As the Co-Vice President of the State Board of Education, Tiffany isn’t just a leader in our state. She also sets an example nationally. That’s why, after just one meeting, she was appointed as the representative to the National Association of State Boards of Education. Tiffany is running for re-election to the State Board of Education to continue advocating to give a voice to underserved populations; fight for increasing equitable funding in an age where so many shy away from Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion; push for more career and technical education programs; address gun violence; increase mental health support; and work to support foster youth across the state. Amir Makled is a civil rights attorney running for University of Michigan Board of Regents. Other board members have prosecuted student protesters and capitulated to Trump. Meanwhile, Amir has provided free legal representation for student protesters. We need Amir’s voice on the board of regents to defend free speech and academic freedom, including students’ and faculty’s right to speak out against injustice without fear of retaliation or surveillance. Shereef Akeel is a civil rights and human rights attorney running for Wayne State University Board of Governors. Like me, he’s a child of immigrants. He has sued banks, discriminatory employers, Border Patrol, the Department of Homeland Security, and military corporations—and won. If he becomes a member of the Board of Governors, he’ll fight for students’ rights and inclusion at my alma mater. Each of these candidates exemplifies how public servants can serve their constituents, not big business and billionaire interests. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Together, we’re demanding a future that includes all of us, not just the wealthy few. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Small Town PAC
subject: Tim and our team want to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Small Town PAC, [smalltownpac
body:
Small Town PAC is working to pass the baton to a new generation of leaders.
#
Peter,
Tim Walz launched Small Town PAC to help Democrats expand the map nationwide by getting back to our roots — turning out voters _everywhere_.
**Too many politicians are leaving small towns behind, letting robber barons like Big Tech billionaires and venture capitalists run the show instead.**
If we’re going to build the majorities we need to pass an agenda that actually improves people’s lives, we have to win in these communities. That starts by listening.
[**Can you take a minute to complete our Launch Survey to let us know what issues are on your mind and what challenges you see facing small towns?**](https://act.timwalz.com/survey/take-our-launch-survey/?t=1&akid=536%2E34582%2E11aRnA)
**[Take the Survey ››](https://act.timwalz.com/survey/take-our-launch-survey/?t=2&akid=536%2E34582%2E11aRnA)**
Small Town PAC is working to pass the baton to a new generation of working-class Democratic leaders. We need more teachers, nurses, veterans, laborers, and young people running for office at every level to give their communities the representation they deserve, from city hall to Congress to the White House.
**As Tim and our team build out this operation, we want to hear from you from the very start.** Your responses will help us understand which issues and races to focus on in the months ahead.
[**Please take our short survey to help us hone in on what is most pressing for folks like you across America right now.**](https://act.timwalz.com/survey/take-our-launch-survey/?t=3&akid=536%2E34582%2E11aRnA)
Thank you,
Small Town PAC

Tim Walz started Small Town PAC to build a Democratic Party that invests in small towns and delivers a message that resonates with rural America.
Together, we're finding and recruiting thoughtful, hardworking people to run for office, and supporting a new generation of leaders who truly reflect and understand their communities.
**[It’s time for Democrats to expand the map and put small towns back at the forefront: pitch in now to help build our movement from the ground up.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stp-ms-em-footer?refcode=em20260426-536&t=4&refcode2=536_34582_11aRnA&akid=536%2E34582%2E11aRnA)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stp-ms-em-footer?refcode=em20260426-536-&t=5&refcode2=536_34582_11aRnA&akid=536%2E34582%2E11aRnA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

Peter, Tim Walz launched Small Town PAC to help Democrats expand the map nationwide by getting back to our roots — turning out voters everywhere. Too many politicians are leaving small towns behind, letting robber barons like Big Tech billionaires and venture capitalists run the show instead. If we’re going to build the majorities we need to pass an agenda that actually improves people’s lives, we have to win in these communities. That starts by listening. Small Town PAC is working to pass the baton to a new generation of working-class Democratic leaders. We need more teachers, nurses, veterans, laborers, and young people running for office at every level to give their communities the representation they deserve, from city hall to Congress to the White House. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

---

name: Bohannan Finance Team
subject: The NRCC is putting cash toward defeating Christina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130205552/616977848/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTNhNmUwNC04OTQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tyIeldXNqXh_Sz7GHBHAMC1nrvoezAqkgceBvvEXYFg=)

Peter,

**The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) just reported a MASSIVE $47.1 million haul in the first three months of 2026. They're already injecting cash into defeating Christina and saving Mariannette Miller-Meeks.**

But we shouldn't be surprised. In the last cycle, major committees like this spent millions of dollars to beat Christina. Despite their efforts, Christina lost by _just_ 799 votes.

With our race being one of the most competitive toss-ups in the country, you can guarantee these groups will keep throwing money at Mariannette Miller-Meeks. _Special interest groups will do whatever it takes to keep this corporate shill in office._

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Have you heard of the Hellcats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Introducing you to Maura Sullivan, a Hellcat running in New Hampshire’s 1st Congressional District.
| | |
---
When I first met Maura Sullivan on the campaign trail, I could not have been more impressed. If you like what I’m fighting for, I know you’ll love what Maura stands for. Please consider supporting her campaign using the link below.
Want to know a little more about her? She’s one of four female veterans running for Congress. Named after the first all-female Marine unit that served in WWI - the Hellcats - these strong women are ready to usher in a new era of leadership to meet this moment.
Maura is running in New Hampshire’s 1st Congressional District. Like me, she comes from a military family and went to college on an ROTC scholarship. She joined the Marines and deployed to Fallujah during the Iraq War. When she came home, she stepped up to serve in the Obama Administration to ensure veterans and their families were receiving the healthcare they deserved. She’s also a mom.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130205718/616978296/48646226?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1256-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTNhNmUwNC04OTQxLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEn7-sL21pSblgO0tIZiEe_RjB5qrpNGzPMl5t_zueU=)
Now, she’s running in a district which has been called one of the “swingiest” swing districts in the country. In the past 20 years, her district has swung between Republican and Democratic control FIVE times. That’s why she needs our support today.

clean_body: Introducing you to Maura Sullivan, a Hellcat running in New Hampshire’s 1st Congressional District. | | | When I first met Maura Sullivan on the campaign trail, I could not have been more impressed. If you like what I’m fighting for, I know you’ll love what Maura stands for. Please consider supporting her campaign using the link below. Want to know a little more about her? She’s one of four female veterans running for Congress. Named after the first all-female Marine unit that served in WWI - the Hellcats - these strong women are ready to usher in a new era of leadership to meet this moment. Maura is running in New Hampshire’s 1st Congressional District. Like me, she comes from a military family and went to college on an ROTC scholarship. She joined the Marines and deployed to Fallujah during the Iraq War. When she came home, she stepped up to serve in the Obama Administration to ensure veterans and their families were receiving the healthcare they deserved. She’s also a mom. = Now, she’s running in a district which has been called one of the “swingiest” swing districts in the country. In the past 20 years, her district has swung between Republican and Democratic control FIVE times. That’s why she needs our support today. We need more fighters like Maura here in the House, and she is the right choice to hold this battleground seat.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Maura Sullivan and Chrissy Houlahan: | | | = | | = | | = | | = There's work to be done, Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. subject: Over 1 Million Listeners—Here’s What They’re Hearing
body:
Our Biggest Podcast Stories of 2026 (So Far)

| | |
---
| |
#

**Good Afternoon!** I want to take a moment to personally thank you for being part of _The Flyover_. One of the most exciting things we've built alongside the newsletter is _The Flyover Podcast_ --and it's been growing fast. In fact, we had over 1.3 million viewers/listeners last month alone, with more people starting their mornings with us every day. If you haven't checked it out yet, now's the time. Each episode is designed to give you a smarter, faster way to stay informed--and our Podcast Extra segment has quickly become everyone's favorite. It's where we go beyond the newsletter to cover stories in-depth, questions, and insights that don't always fit in an inbox. **Here are some of our top Podcast Extra stories of 2026 so far:**
* These four Social Security changes will affect millions of retirees' budgets, shrinking their monthly spending limits ([Tune In)](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFugzAYBOCnMVuQ_RtjMnioFDFUSjt0aDMhgs_BlcER_EmUt6_o0CfoA9ynu_s8dsc-pjhf3voJjkPuPHwceobvZjzWBGYsXb5jUVNMKeY5xZUxY1lHLOhIUr2T1Y7qrr2ldPhLq8K7ABB0AaestaT2RtlidNgPngCipu-VVdBNgPGNNbWV0htZRLepsqJa1dIoU57PA4JSBATSTfCikvCR81J-5zjziJCeW8VyyFOR3Mh8XYV-EdQKap_5xrfyDEHte5g-Xu3pq8JJ6JaFPmhpisX562PbttZWVPIy9TH9SvzPh9wd_QQAAP__-od7Jg)

clean_body: Our Biggest Podcast Stories of 2026 (So Far) | | | | | Good Afternoon! I want to take a moment to personally thank you for being part of The Flyover. One of the most exciting things we've built alongside the newsletter is The Flyover Podcast --and it's been growing fast. In fact, we had over 1.3 million viewers/listeners last month alone, with more people starting their mornings with us every day. If you haven't checked it out yet, now's the time. Each episode is designed to give you a smarter, faster way to stay informed--and our Podcast Extra segment has quickly become everyone's favorite. It's where we go beyond the newsletter to cover stories in-depth, questions, and insights that don't always fit in an inbox. Here are some of our top Podcast Extra stories of 2026 so far: These four Social Security changes will affect millions of retirees' budgets, shrinking their monthly spending limits ( After 20 years of cardiology, this doctor shares seven things he never does after 7 p.m. () Are you one of the millions of Amazon Prime users who may be eligible for a refund? () These six hidden costs are quietly wiping out seniors' Social Security increases () Our podcast is made possible by our sponsors, and we're intentional about working with brands we trust. Today's episode is brought to you by partner we're proud to stand behind. When you support them, you're supporting us. protects your knives while offering unbeatable stability for everyday prep. Easy to clean and built to last, it's the premium board serious home cooks swear by. From breaking down what's really happening with Social Security... to practical advice that could impact your daily habits and long-term health... to the moments everyone's talking about, like the Tucker vs. POTUS clash --it's all here, fast and to the point. Tucker Carlson and Donald Trump were allies just three months ago. Now, they're publicly at odds. What happened, and what's been said? () If you haven't listened yet, now's a great time to jump in and catch up on today's full episode. 👉 We're grateful to have you with us--and excited about where the podcast is headed next. -- Cole , CEO of The Flyover PS. | (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

subject: RE: Tell Congress: Reject Trump’s executive order

body:
Trump is fighting to take over our elections. We have to fight back even harder. | |
---
Peter, **Trump is really, really afraid his MAGA cronies are facing a huge loss in the 2026 midterm elections.** That’s why he’s trying so hard to rig them. He’s pushing gerrymandering, ICE threats, the SAVE Act—and he’s got the Supreme Court considering tearing down the Voting Rights Act. **Now, Trump has signed an executive order attempting to rewrite voting rules, giving himself the power to reject millions of ballots.** The wannabe dictator is trying to entrench MAGA power by tipping the scales against the very communities that turn out in force when voting is accessible. **This is how the wealthy and powerful steal power from working people so that only their voice matters, not ours.** **United for Democracy is coordinating the fight to stop Trump’s attempts to take over our elections and destroy our democracy.** It’s up to all of us to put massive pressure on Congress right now to protect our voting rights. **[We can’t allow Trump to steal power over elections that the Constitution gives to states. Demand Congress reject Trump’s executive order and defend our vote before it’s too late.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxb4t0bZnMkKuRpDrcw-GGlOjxXYw3nkHOuvdOqSoWXQ5a_bey_ozOhNBXhgTwASFJsOEJpLom1nJBLJLcjlTSQEN7P6w5mGrgWQMy3xS051wdTT385OkHnBZyDE-ko1vFTmTVJ5cMl3o2YR1UXAB7Pk6jcBdquSi5-nz7UXn-vXwjiKBxuvI8KkoxKP5z6nkaPe-9PlPLFIb1oPHDcx0sGa_c0YnPvjNOpIW0riQB3vVtWPPEc9EfVfvnxHrVW0tzCAGlhHytuIeRB7M9d_5k9E7YvEQS8nsktysaMPpTSmvckhqJ5TqwgM0ztVDE13XAt5EBoa5S0kUQsZiehMJXJRGSySDvMkb9vKdOBCEJgQVG299ZaWte_8CMeN5AxMbV/4q4/ExyTuLxgQbSvjaa9nmatuw/h0/h001.IT8T3fuGn32_7WSEHhpgeod7H6EvHSJu7vI2knFzsH8)** **** [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxb4t0bZnMkKuRpDrcw-GGlOjxXYw3nkHOuvdOqSoWXQ5a_bey_ozOhNBXhgTwASFJsOEJpLom1nJBLJLcjlTSQEN7P6w5mGrgWQMy3xS051wdTT385OkHnBZyDE-ko1vFTmTVJ5cMl3o2YR1UXAB7Pk6jcBdquSi5-nz7UXn-vXwjiKBxuvI8KkoxKP5z6nkagQ6kPSk0NCEM_A_Ym3_YkEM6BaWu6eGqHqQXoE-a0Q4wehAfKoS0g2UNMTjaYmZqP8kTzbvP6ITt2UpA5-1gMagsNuCBwawV-iz-oKMTA9ul0PvCsq_05TC8TZf8daFif1DomEX6NCHXoLf7BexJUhFroMA1GjFprC9soFFhQJsk5pzCXS4dtx9SFs1tjr32/4q4/ExyTuLxgQbSvjaa9nmatuw/h1/h001.pPw5vVUGmPaRcckaxJaenk9Drj0W4ftR7C2HPzhrOOQ) **** If any lower courts dare to intervene, the Supreme Court will likely stop them. After all, they rule in Trump’s favor 90% of the time, and Chief Justice Roberts has been chomping at the bit to kill voting rights for decades. **This is why MAGA extremists rigged our justice system in the first place—so they could get away with tearing democracy down brick by brick.** And without the right to vote in free and fair elections, we don’t have a democracy at all. We’re building the mass movement to fight back against these wealthy extremists and corrupt politicians and justices—now is the time to put massive pressure on Congress and demand they overturn Trump’s executive order. **In a democracy, our representatives have listen to us, not the elites pulling the strings.** **[Congress needs to hear from us right now. Tell them that We the People expect them to protect the vote and save democracy from Trump’s attacks.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxb4t0bZnMkKuRpDrcw-GGlOjxXYw3nkHOuvdOqSoWXQ5a_bey_ozOhNBXhgTwASFJsOEJpLom1nJBLJLcjlTSQEN7P6w5mGrgWQMy3xS051wdTT385OkHnBZyDE-ko1vFTmTVJ5cMl3o2YR1UXAB7Pk6jcBdquSi5-nz7UXn-vXwjiKBxuvI8KkoxKP5z6nkaM_MYLPPo1VhGOUiT7flzf8WUDvIyG8yWYJFlFfrTCMmfrTczQJxws7vWVaOGDhk_AXdRbtQ4rZvOr8uI3AP1RFzKuNKNs9no4T28aC02rWySKCFr4_WV2CBQCSIw3MC67o78n__Q5RkXjgcrKFIU3ySEy5gAOYaUPU8oQzGXm49oLo2EJR7QsAao9Kb9OnBd/4q4/ExyTuLxgQbSvjaa9nmatuw/h2/h001.2Uzhe4PxzcwUMRv_6zeDgtdRNPgtl375TQ6ns21gYXg)** Thank you for fighting for voting rights, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy
* * *
**\-- PREVIOUS EMAIL --** Peter, **Trump and the****ext****remist MAGA elites backing him have officially pulled out every tool in the voter suppression toolbook.** First, they began racially gerrymandering districts across the country, starting in Texas and Florida. Their redrawn districts essentially conjured brand new, solid red districts out of thin air by strategically disenfranchising historically Democratic voters. Then, they said they were thinking about deploying ICE agents to polling places. The effect? Chilling voter turnout in the immigrant communities who are fed up with Trump’s abuse. **They’re currently in the midst of strong-arming the captured Supreme Court to gut the _Voting Rights Act_ , which would open the floodgates for their gerrymandering efforts and lock in all those new red districts. ** And now, Trump has signed an Executive Order taking over elections, creating a “citizen list” determining who can vote, and instructing the Post Office to refuse ballots to anyone not on the list. Millions of eligible voters are at risk of being left off the list. Add this to his dangerous “stolen election” rhetoric, MAGA’s mass disinformation, and his attempt to redefine who counts as an American, and we have a full-on attack on our elections. **Without the unfettered****right to vote in free and fair elections, we don’t have a democracy at all. That’s his entire goal.** [**It’s up to us to put massive pressure on Congress to defend our democracy—before it’s too late. subject: They came for my guns last night.
body:
Last night, armed police officers walked into my newsroom and took my firearms. No warning. No arrest. No crime committed. They walked into the headquarters
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15052897/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWENDZ2NrVEhOdA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MjY/LbmNseWdCUzlCbw/qP2hpZHM9bmMwWnJTeDBLY0JYNnhscw/gae471w/scs9b75fe22)

| | | | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")
---
| Dear Patriot,
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35") **Last night, armed police officers walked into my newsroom and took my firearms.** No warning. No arrest. No crime committed. They walked into the headquarters of O’Keefe Media Group in West Palm Beach, Florida — **a working newsroom** — and confiscated every firearm I own. I posted the video immediately. Over **280,000 people have already watched it** on X. Here’s what triggered this: Matthew Tyrmand — a former Project Veritas board member — filed a domestic violence restraining order against me in Miami-Dade County. **This is the same man who admitted on our hidden cameras to being an FBI-SDNY informant against me.** The same man who **admitted multiple times on camera that he wanted me dead.** The same man who **shot up my book with rifle bullets through my heart on the cover.** **And HE got a restraining order against ME.** The audacity of evil has no bounds, Patriot. ****| [ HELP JAMES FIGHT BACK — CHIP IN $35 NOW ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")
---
This morning, I was in a Miami courtroom fighting to get my constitutional rights restored. We had to bring in attorneys pro hac vice from multiple jurisdictions — lawyers who don’t normally practice in this court, specially admitted just to defend me. **That costs a small fortune.**
But here’s what happened: **Judge Marie E. Mato overturned the firearms prohibition.** Her words from the bench:
_"Mr. O’Keefe, you are free to pick up your firearms in West Palm Beach at the Sheriff’s Office."_
**We won this round.** But Patriot, the fight is far from over.
The restraining order is still active. The legal battle continues. And the bills are mounting every single day. Pro hac vice attorneys. Emergency hearings. Court filings across multiple counties. **This is exactly the kind of legal warfare designed to bleed a journalist dry until he stops investigating.**
****
[ DONATE $50 TO DEFEND JAMES O’KEEFE’S FIRST AND SECOND AMENDMENT RIGHTS ](50 "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")
---
Think about what’s really happening here: **a confirmed FBI informant who said he wanted me dead is using the court system to disarm me and silence my reporting.**
Our hidden camera caught Tyrmand admitting he served as an FBI informant working with the Southern District of New York — against me. Instead of being held accountable, he filed a restraining order. Instead of facing justice for his threats, he’s weaponizing the legal system to punish me for exposing him.
**This is what happens when you investigate the powerful. They don’t just fight back — they try to destroy you.**
Patriot, here’s what your donation funds right now:
**[**$35 — Frontline Supporter:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Covers court filing fees for one motion in this case
**[**$50 — Constitutional Defender:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Funds one hour of legal research for James’s defense
**[**$100 — First Amendment Guardian:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Pays for pro hac vice attorney admission in a new jurisdiction
**[**$250 — Investigative Shield:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Covers one day of emergency legal representation
**[**$500 or more — Founding Defender:**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Funds a full court filing and brief preparation
****
[ RUSH YOUR BEST GIFT NOW TO DEFEND JAMES ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")
---
They took my firearms from my own newsroom, Patriot. Think about that. **A journalist. In America. Disarmed by police — because an FBI informant filed paperwork.**
If they can do this to me, they can do it to anyone. And if we don’t fight back now — with the best lawyers, in every courtroom, on every motion — **they will keep coming.**
I will never stop investigating. I will never stop exposing corruption. But I cannot do this without you standing beside me.
**[**Please give your most generous gift right now — $35, $50, $100, $250, or whatever you can — to help me defend my rights and continue this fight.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")**
****
[ YES — I’LL STAND WITH JAMES. DONATE NOW. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")
---

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** Last night they walked into my newsroom and took my guns. This morning a judge gave them back. But the man who admitted on hidden camera to being an FBI informant against me — the man who said he wanted me dead — is still using the courts to come after me. The legal bills are real. The threat is real. And I need your help today. **[**Please donate right now.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-firearms-taken-mb-om/?utm_source=lg-omg-firearms-taken&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=22879_wr1&amount=35")**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314
