| | | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Cruz: Schumer Will Shut Down Government Weeks Before Midterms:](https://trk.email.tedcruz._qucAQ)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) predicted Tuesday that Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) would shut down the government shortly before this year's midterms. "On Sept. 30, funding for the federal government will end. Chuck Schumer is not a creative guy, he's not hard to predict. Last year, right before the election, what did Schumer do? He shut the whole government down, and the Democrats believe that shutdown helped them politically, and it benefited them in New Jersey and Virginia," Cruz said on CNBC's "Squawk Box," referencing a shutdown..." **[Ted Cruz Pledges To Protect NASA Funding Amid Proposed Budget Cuts:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "The Trump administration's latest budget proposal once again calls for steep cuts to NASA, and has set up a familiar clash with Congress over how the space agency should be funded. The White House released its fiscal year (FY) 2027 federal budget request on April 3 -- just two days after the launch of NASA's Artemis 2 mission, while the four astronauts aboard Orion were still heading toward the moon. It mirrors the cuts outlined in last year's FY26 presidential budget request (PBR) recommending reducing NASA's overall budget by 23%, with a nearly 50%..." **[Cruz On Possible Spirit Airlines Bailout:'Terrible Idea':](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) on Wednesday ripped the Trump administration's potential bailout of Spirit Airlines. "This is an absolutely TERRIBLE idea," Cruz wrote on the social platform X of the deal. Bloomberg reported that under the deal, the administration could own as much as 90 percent of the airline, which has filed for bankruptcy twice within the past two years. The Texas Republican, who chairs the Senate Commerce, Science and Transportation Committee, also referenced the Troubled Asset Relief Program -- under which the federal government..." **[Sen. Ted Cruz Looks To Prevent Future Muleshoe Wildlife Refuge Expansion:](https://trk.email.tedcruz._UQfqFg3dT6jjqIQ)** "Senator Ted Cruz is proposing a law that would prevent the government from expanding Muleshoe Wildlife Refuge, he announced to EverythingLubbock.com on Tuesday. In 2022, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service announced plans to expand the refuge from 6,440 acres to up to 700,000 acres, handing over a large chunk of Texas land to the federal government. The proposed Land Protection Plan largely aimed to protect wildlife, like Lesser Prairie-Chicken Pronghorn Antelope, in the region. body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@taniel.bsky.social‬: Indiana already has stringent voter ID rules... & the GOP is advancing a bill right now to strip university IDs from the list of options you can use. This would make it much harder for students to vote. At polling site at IU Bloomington, 2/3rds of voters in November used their student IDs. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Bolts_Indiana_StudentID.png]

name: Chip Roy
subject: Higher crime and lower wages
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
Communists, Marxists, Islamists, and Socialists want to make us more like Europe. |
Why do we continue to import people who hate us, Peter?

Our immigration system has been cynically used to disadvantage American workers' competitiveness in favor of mass importing from the third world.

It's led to higher crime and lower wages. But that's not the only problem.

We're importing people who are hostile and downright fundamentally opposed to the American values that make our country great.

Just look at what Communists, Marxists, Islamists, and Socialists have done to Europe. We cannot let that happen here at home.

**[Peter, I need you in this fight.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6500c07b0416466abbc0ff3068726b43&_e=U2YTXYj2DEFXcxDR9xPeoLpGwU-ntPTSKSs5tUFyhLmUrVnntahKn3oQSVV4k0smD3tTfUqNNzpYeCbDUrDladNwK4zezkkkZekjtlWCWLYMiDxvuEbZKUhP_1JlssXUJ5rzlm64F67W6vq34XKLy8Qycy-EwG0guMv06aqN3AdFuUHCS4Sof1xgeMU2f7dvg5AT88qEJMMAnChJO4eyam5gow5NpmfxJsWcdHBUv-_72tuGve8dFhacHrhB4S2_5J4xXtFkIEengdXMUAin2wa8lCPq0dmSqjBB2n0Ppq1SxpitLX96mPZvE7uLSYDXVlzWVrkSdKvjnGPoHQOamvZwfN5W2xQXkwZjJl-PwqeU_d2DjOh1UIaLjjZsxyB-AwlhTddsUEXEvWBF8IvufXlLPe2Ku8SDf_weXyPi32xw8vD58mxuMM97PPcPbBQ-ey-JfiLLGaQJ58aOxIV0t7fibGOIoj2bVfvYbtRHBpFxee0PRWFhzagW1btUjrWrWkLDcNrkq8V1cmDJASSqVjfFtl8hno-PuIODr-_fMg-bYM04fLpL9E4KKHAHU5qg5XlKkKGiSF0rFK3FZyo3vTAsZTa5j2Oohm0_S4kGZL_znxaJH2i_xTJIdcW7sR1On9ojwFmXCXBiQy61p7rkTB0MljygqRdNmkONF3ygW98%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6500c07b0416466abbc0ff3068726b43&_e=U2YTXYj2DEFXcxDR9xPeoLpGwU-ntPTSKSs5tUFyhLmUrVnntahKn3oQSVV4k0smD3tTfUqNNzpYeCbDUrDladNwK4zezkkkZekjtlWCWLYMiDxvuEbZKUhP_1JlssXUJ5rzlm64F67W6vq34XKLy8Qycy-EwG0guMv06aqN3AdFuUHCS4Sof1xgeMU2f7dvg5AT88qEJMMAnChJO4eyam5gow5NpmfxJsWcdHBUv-8EryI9oVYrbi4e5VbSn9PgcdLnr9R84BgbdgF1zLwqV5nwAcr0iUpjSBfylOgSHJevirIb9h2jnwdT8_B4OqJ9qKIYVbE5rCRgywmzcMobIT-RtJlJ9GWxy7w265-hlKypqWtnlqg2JJdE4VGg6-4d5zAD3qB-V4fyHYHoQGJ_fqZ-Q0-zU_9X25heta7QfKkN7NjHfwFA36EEH529xT7NOmrv5ZbdzXHSxwzohuMHe_8xU_ms9COMk6EM7Q9KIWGKz4Fyr3O-U03YldFRbP-BLq90HJ5JPV3axfSGV9cC-Y7eeL2hYIaoLVG3oBp3DrzEz5HzHByUfa01ISGHEg2TcVyeFYua2erT1NH4TYokXqA1bwnERIgMAss0jgV3NZXoKvV6M5wy_UmQqY7SccuUIHlNIldCdFg00QELWrEn8A_o0aArrjVqNiiVlsf9fkA%3D)
We need to stop allowing people to enter the country who are vehemently opposed to the foundation of American values like free-market capitalism.

But not just there - we need to DEPORT them, too.

America is not obligated to welcome foreign visitors who despise our Western values and seek to undermine our way of life.

These are the important fights. We cannot back down, and we need conservative leaders like you to show the DC political class that we aren't the silent majority.

clean_body: Communists, Marxists, Islamists, and Socialists want to make us more like Europe. | Why do we continue to import people who hate us, Peter? Our immigration system has been cynically used to disadvantage American workers' competitiveness in favor of mass importing from the third world. It's led to higher crime and lower wages. But that's not the only problem. We're importing people who are hostile and downright fundamentally opposed to the American values that make our country great. Just look at what Communists, Marxists, Islamists, and Socialists have done to Europe. We cannot let that happen here at home. We need to stop allowing people to enter the country who are vehemently opposed to the foundation of American values like free-market capitalism. But not just there - we need to DEPORT them, too. America is not obligated to welcome foreign visitors who despise our Western values and seek to undermine our way of life. These are the important fights. We cannot back down, and we need conservative leaders like you to show the DC political class that we aren't the silent majority. Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Growing up right here in Orange County, I’ve witnessed this community’s highs and lows up close. My parents taught me the value of hard work, caring for your neighbors, and committing yourself to service and education — lessons that shaped every step of my path to public service.
**That’s why my work has always been guided by the same principle: showing up for the community that raised me.**
As the Representative for this community, I will continue to keep fighting for opportunity, dignity, and a future where everyone has a fair shot.
Representing North Carolina’s Fourth Congressional District is one of my life’s greatest honors, and it wouldn’t be possible without your continued support.
I hope my record speaks for itself, Peter. I have never wavered in my support for this community, and I never will. And I’m running for reelection because our work isn’t done. But we can’t win without your support.
The midterms are nearly 6 months away, and your support today could help put us in a great position to reach our April fundraising goal and keep our momentum going.
**[We've got a lot of work to do from now until November. But if we're in this together, I know that we're going to win. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Building a healthier New Mexico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)
---
Friend: Like many New Mexicans, I know what it’s like to live with the fear of not being able to afford a doctor’s visit.

But this is exactly why I am running for Governor of New Mexico — so we can protect Medicaid, lower costs, invest in doctors and nurses, and end corporate interests in our healthcare system.

From day one, I will fight to protect access to healthcare, but I can only deliver on this vision with grassroots supporters from people like you.

**That's why I'm looking for 1,000 people to sign my petition if, like me, they believe that every New Mexican deserves access to quality, affordable healthcare._[Will you add your name right now?](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_healthcare_petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk605-su-nd&refcode=jtk605-su-nd&t=2&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)_**
| | [SIGN ON: "I believe New Mexicans deserve access to quality, affordable healthcare"](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_healthcare_petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk605-su-nd&refcode=jtk605-su-nd&t=3&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)
---
There's no way around it, friend: The Trump administration's policies are making New Mexicans sicker and poorer, and eliminating access to healthcare for so many. _Because of Trump’s policies,**5** rural hospitals could close in New Mexico!_ **But with the right leadership, our state can be the first line of defense against their dangerous policies.**
**
Here's how I plan to fight back on day one as Governor:**
|
* We'll address the doctor shortage by expanding residency programs to rural areas, and bolstering student loan repayment and housing incentives.

* We'll increase mobile health clinics to reach New Mexicans in rural areas and protect rural hospitals.

* We'll ban medical debt from being included on credit reports.

* We'll protect access for those who use the state’s health insurance marketplace by expanding New Mexico’s Health Care Affordability Fund.

* We'll use budget surpluses to fill Medicaid gaps and hire more guides to help people keep and access their benefits.

* We'll launch a full throttle operation to deliver mental health and homelessness assistance to New Mexicans in need.

---
I will always make sure every New Mexican — regardless of where they live, or how much money they have — can get the care they need, friend.

But I can't do it alone.

**I need to know where supporters like you stand, so please:_[Will you be one of 1,000 people in your state to add your name to my petition and show your support for a healthier future for New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_healthcare_petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk605-su-nd&refcode=jtk605-su-nd&t=4&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)_**
| | [SIGN ON: "I believe New Mexicans deserve access to quality, affordable healthcare."](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_mw_202604_healthcare_petition?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk605-su-nd&refcode=jtk605-su-nd&t=5&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)
---
Together, we can make sure that our state’s healthcare system is built around patients and not profits.

Thank you for your support,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1101?refcode=jtk605-su-nd&t=6&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5298?refcode=jtk605-su-nd&t=7&akid=9197%2E400544%2EMGmOOv)
---

Hi, it’s Paige.

Sorry this is a bit informal, but I just had to reach you quickly with an update on my race.

In a race as competitive as this one, it’s going to take all of us. This district is as competitive as it gets, and I’ll need your help to take on Rob Bresnahan.

With just over six months until Election Day, this race is about to reach a new level of intensity, and I’m so grateful to have you on our team as things heat up.

Thank you, again, for being on my team and fighting alongside me.

Paige Cognetti

[](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_af_20260426_1_ak.kYdviF&amount=5&refcode=em20260426-36&t=2&akid=36%2E127862%2EyvWtLo)
As Attorney General, Aaron has gone after the bad guys over and over again.
He’s taken on corporate scammers ripping off Nevada families, fraudsters trying to game the system, and the Trump administration when it tries to undermine our voting rights.
**Now, he’s running for governor to take this work to the next level, but first, we have to defeat MAGA Governor Joe Lombardo.**
If we’re going to win, we need the resources to reach undecided voters and make sure they know Aaron’s track record of fighting for us.
**[Friend, can you chip in $5 right now to help us continue building a broad coalition of support across the state?](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_af_20260426_1_ak.kYdviF&amount=5&refcode=em20260426-36&t=3&akid=36%2E127862%2EyvWtLo)**

subject: This email is only 5 sentences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:

so I promised myself I’d keep this to just five sentences.

Polls already show this race is going to be close, and my opponents have
the backing of billionaire donors trying to tip the scales.

I’m building this campaign the right way, powered by people like you,
which means every bit of support matters.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4261?t=1001&akid=1606%2E181023%2EI2bRDI ]With our end-of-month deadline just four days away, can you chip in $25
or whatever feels right today to help us stay competitive and keep the
governor’s office blue?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

name: The Resistance Lab via Team Jayapal
subject: Celebrating one year of the Resistance Lab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
So far more than 30,000 people from all 50 states (and even other countries!) have joined our trainings.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260426-6178-footer&t=1&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)
Peter, Pramila launched the Resistance Lab last year because she knows the fight against rising authoritarianism will take all of us getting organized and prepared to fight back.
So far more than 30,000 people from all 50 states (and even other countries!) have joined a training.
**Our next session is just one week away on Sunday, May 3rd, where we’ll be commemorating one year of doing this work together — and we’d love for you to join us!**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/53179?utm_source=em20260426-6178&t=2&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)
**[RSVP Now](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/53179?utm_source=em20260426-6178&t=3&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)**
In this session, we’ll explore how movements around the world have stood up to authoritarian power, share proven strategies for effective resistance, and help you channel this moment into meaningful action.
You’ll also get the chance to connect with a growing community of people who are just as determined to fight for our communities and our democracy as you are.
**Whether you’ve attended a session before and you’re ready to take the next step, or even if you’re brand new to the movement, this training is for you —[so join us next Sunday and let’s train, organize, and get ready to resist together.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/53179?utm_source=em20260426-6178&t=4&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)**
We hope to see you there!
— Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260426-6178-footer&t=5&refcode2=6178_420207_nC2WG4&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=6178%2E420207%2EnC2WG4)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: We have 5 days and here's the honest truth about what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiros for Congress](https://cefuo8hbb
body:
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline hits in just five days, and I want to be real with you about what that actually means.
| | | | | [](https://cefuo8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X8Hv65fYDAnBkpa3xJsPZznhSFUmTgXnzqH4aXwJ9ptyhYkUKb8sntA2AFLjZP1N1zlLtnA39PvR9Jxkqd51D0fn5Xk-8CE26ZelbtqJvF4dJfg_BYAFDfjuQCgDlR0LZHgCxVXcTT8yKRrK2kI2VCfmb2jRssWp4sckf23YFwnp9IekBTcYTvCj9TprhI_Dq7tkMi8GJoKnfWhqEiDtdMHGslGYDIF6YHIsVC7PDTHy0y1wOESGuaBjcFAVoSei6e9k-6bTZHe_lGMTMZ9pGv4RbkTyaYbqWGH1R6f7Zrw=&c=1ybfkffId3zIUZ4y_RCQ2nrw3D6gxmK2litXfppjtnTy5d72Tox9bw==&ch=rRwdjbdH0NXgVVpkt4NIgYnhD7lmqXwhnaeOaFrOpwngM8sq-47Vuw==)

|
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline hits in just five days, and I want to be real with you about what that actually means.
This isn't some deadline our team made up to create urgency. It's not a gimmick.
At the end of this month, we're going to sit down and look at where we are financially and decide what we can actually fund in this final stretch before ballots go out in our primary (IN JUST 43 DAYS). That means we're deciding how much we can budget for organizing, digital outreach, and all the programs that will determine whether we can reach enough voters to win.
That meeting is scheduled for the beginning of May, and right now, we need to raise $7,000 online before that meeting happens!
If we hit it, with that extra $7,000, we can give our organizing team the boost they need to pursue the best possible get-out-the-vote plan, but if we don't - we have to make hard decisions about who we talk to.
I'm not going to sugarcoat it. We're running a grassroots campaign against a 30-year incumbent with a war chest built on corporate PAC money. Every dollar we raise from people like you is a dollar that says: this race is real, and we're not going anywhere. Will you chip in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mkiros-email](https://cefuo8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X8Hv65fYDAnBkpa3xJsPZznhSFUmTgXnzqH4aXwJ9ptyhYkUKb8sntA2AFLjZP1N1zlLtnA39PvR9Jxkqd51D0fn5Xk-8CE26ZelbtqJvF4dJfg_BYAFDfjuQCgDlR0LZHgCxVXcTT8yKRrK2kI2VCfmb2jRssWp4sckf23YFwnp9IekBTcYTvCj9TprhI_Dq7tkMi8GJoKnfWhqEiDtdMHGslGYDIF6R0gu7L-azmpL2GwrUVtTMHa3Y483CY8W2YUFAd1QMQRHLBNu-EtqmneaEMchqI-s2Pf2h3XcJ4c=&c=1ybfkffId3zIUZ4y_RCQ2nrw3D6gxmK2litXfppjtnTy5d72Tox9bw==&ch=rRwdjbdH0NXgVVpkt4NIgYnhD7lmqXwhnaeOaFrOpwngM8sq-47Vuw==)
Thank you - seriously.
Melat

name: Nellie Pou
subject: This isn't an accident
body:
This is a targeted attack on the right to vote.

| |
---
Have you seen this, friend? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130214545/617003383/-200729754?refcode=260426_np_eom2_img&ms=260426_np_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQxYzk1YzMtYTA0MS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8DSUr19ifIymMTwpdGQSZdE5efQXDWLhULjm_WG-_KA=) This administration is completely overreaching. Voting is a fundamental right, but MAGA is targeting mail-in voting and actively working to make it more difficult for citizens to cast their ballots. This isn't an accident. It's a targeted attack on our right to vote because they're afraid of losing their grip on power. But I refuse to be silent. I won't stand on the sidelines while one of our most fundamental freedoms is being attacked right in front of our eyes. We must hold this administration accountable, and that's exactly what New Jerseyans elected me to do. name: Seth Moulton
subject: Trump doesn't get to rewrite this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
He created this mess.

| |
---
Friend, Every day, Donald Trump puts out a new statement begging for a standing ovation for what he is doing in Iran. I just wanted to clarify a few things: Obama negotiated a nuclear deal with Iran. It wasn't perfect, but it was working. Iran's nuclear program was contained, inspectors were on the ground, and we weren't at war. Even Trump's first administration confirmed Iran was following through on the deal. And he still tore it up. No replacement, no plan. He just ripped it apart as part of his usual grandstanding because Obama's name was on it. And now, after starting a war with no strategy, no congressional authorization, and posting unhinged threats on social media in between, he wants credit for cleaning up the mess. The mess __**he**__ made. My girls are 5 and 7. Even they know you don't get a pat on the back for breaking something and then gluing it back together. If Obama's Iran deal was so bad, what's the plan now? Because from where I'm sitting, it looks a lot like the same deal, but with casualties and billions of dollars wasted. **[We're not letting him rewrite this. Our end-of-month deadline is coming up, and we need to show that this campaign has the resources to keep calling this out in real time. clean_body: He created this mess. | | Friend, Every day, Donald Trump puts out a new statement begging for a standing ovation for what he is doing in Iran. I just wanted to clarify a few things: Obama negotiated a nuclear deal with Iran. It wasn't perfect, but it was working. Iran's nuclear program was contained, inspectors were on the ground, and we weren't at war. Even Trump's first administration confirmed Iran was following through on the deal. And he still tore it up. No replacement, no plan. He just ripped it apart as part of his usual grandstanding because Obama's name was on it. And now, after starting a war with no strategy, no congressional authorization, and posting unhinged threats on social media in between, he wants credit for cleaning up the mess. The mess he made. My girls are 5 and 7. Even they know you don't get a pat on the back for breaking something and then gluing it back together. If Obama's Iran deal was so bad, what's the plan now? Because from where I'm sitting, it looks a lot like the same deal, but with casualties and billions of dollars wasted. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. He doesn't get a victory lap on this. — Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a Marine and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. name: Haley Stevens
subject: For unions. For workers. For Michigan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Why support from Michigan unions matters so much to me.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.2V3oo0KNvbXwWq6U8CFK_ZhpPnZYdg3ZoWn62oYlUkk?) for more
---
# [For unions. For workers. For Michigan.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=195276280&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1Mjc2MjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyMzA0MjMsImV4cCI6MTc3OTgyMjQyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.p0-dQ2OfPeYJgKkZnmQyL4X1jr45M8KkNHCPvNy1j_s)
### Why support from Michigan unions matters so much to me.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Apr 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..p1eoXCxUH5QaBtl3IdOABXliHqZm28ktH93nrSJrDWo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/for-unions-for-workers-for-michigan?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In politics, a lot of people say they'll fight for workers. They say they support labor. They say they understand Michigan.
But here's the thing: When people who actually do the work - the folks on the shop floor and on the job site - decide to put their name behind you, that means something. Especially in Michigan.
It means they trust you. And that's not something I take lightly.
**I 'm incredibly proud to have earned strong support from unions across Michigan. In fact, I've earned more union endorsements than any candidate in this Senate race - and more than double the number of my closest competitor.**
That matters.
Not just because endorsements are important in a campaign, but because these endorsements say something bigger about who I am, what I've fought for, and what kind of senator I'll be.
Michigan is a union state. We've always been a state of workers, built by grit. We're the people who know what it means to clock in early, get the job done, and take pride in doing it right.
That's the Michigan that raised me. That's what I know. And that's who I've spent my career fighting for.
When I helped lead the auto rescue under President Obama, it wasn't abstract to me. I'd stay late on Fridays to take the calls from concerned Michiganders directly. It was about real people. Real families. Real communities. It was about whether Michigan was going to keep building things, keep making things, and keep offering working people a path to a decent life.
We got the job done and helped save more than 200,000 Michigan auto jobs.
And I have never forgotten what that moment taught me: When we invest in Michigan workers and fight for their future, there is nothing we cannot build.
[That is why I've stayed laser-focused on protecting and growing Michigan manufacturing.](https://substack.com/redirect/4310713e-5a5c-45d5-866a-afc0e68984e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) It's why I've fought to bring investment and advanced manufacturing jobs back to our state and why I've worked to strengthen workforce training.
It's also why I've pushed back on Trump's reckless tariffs that threaten Michigan industries and jobs while driving up costs for families.
And it's why I talk so much about Michiganders struggling to afford groceries, gas, and health care - because these issues are all connected.
**If you care about workers, you care about costs.**
If you care about Michigan, you care about whether the people doing the hardest work can actually afford to live.
That's what labor understands better than anybody.
And they know I've been in the fight. They know I've shown up. And they know I'll work harder for them than anybody in the Senate.
I'm also proud because this support says something about the kind of campaign we're building.
This is a grassroots campaign. It's being built by real people in union halls, on factory floors, and at job sites. It's being built in conversations with working people who want a government that actually works for them.
That's the coalition we need to win in Michigan. And yes, it's also how Democrats can take back the Senate.
Poll after poll has shown that our campaign is in the strongest position to beat Mike Rogers. And part of the reason for that is simple: **Michiganders can tell when you mean what you say.**
They can tell when your support comes from real relationships, real trust, and a real record of getting stuff done.
**[Because at the end of the day, I'm not running for Senate to make speeches about working people. I'm running to go fight and deliver for them.](https://substack.com/redirect/4310713e-5a5c-45d5-866a-afc0e68984e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
For the welders.
For the machinists.
For the bricklayers.
For the teamsters.
For the ironworkers.
For the hospitality workers.
For the nurses.
For the pipefitters and steamfitters.
And for so many more.
I'm running for the people who keep this state moving and who deserve a Senator who never forgets where she comes from and who she works for.
For unions. For workers. For Michigan.
**I 'm proud that labor has my back. I've got theirs.**
More soon.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/4310713e-5a5c-45d5-866a-afc0e68984e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..p1eoXCxUH5QaBtl3IdOABXliHqZm28ktH93nrSJrDWo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2026 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..es4NWE5axIkl0Q2IpFx1S5HYw3KSSRU6GJE79Qlie0E?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/66286a4f-47cf-4064-98ee-7ea727d8a227?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..dGXCG-olX-LHb-rGBlk-wy94rlPkdbF3FWLejdKERgU?)

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Why California is a warning for America

You’re already feeling it, and it’s only getting worse.
Higher gas means higher prices on everything: groceries, rent, daily life.
If you’re ready to fight back, chip in $20, $35, or $50 right now to help us flipt TX-2 BLUE. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0426]

Lower costs for working families, take on price gouging, hold MAGA and Trump accountable for decisions that raise your bills, protect your right to affordable healthcare and reproductive rights, and stop ICE from terrorizing communities.
This is a must-win swing district. If we don’t act now, nothing changes. So please, donate today, and let’s finally put a stop to this madness. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0426]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: the first ad is up and it’s ALL LIES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is urgent, Peter: The first vicious attack ad of the cycle was launched against me and it is full of lies and misinformation to sway voters and tear down our momentum.
If we don't fight back ASAP, it could cost us this race and FLIP New Mexico red. **[Could you please rush a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103107?refcode=em20260426-10349&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=10349%2E614464%2EhzqDj2)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103107?refcode=em20260426-10349&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10349%2E614464%2EhzqDj2)**
It has never been more essential, Peter, to ensure New Mexico has a Democratic governor. Even in the last few days, Trump has reiterated how much power, not people, is his priority. He’s willing to continue an illegal war at the expense of your Medicare, Medicaid, and childcare. And now he’s trying to use the Supreme Court to do his dirty work, pushing to rewrite our Constitution and even casting doubt on whether Native Americans are birthright citizens.
They know if I’m in office, I’ll stop them. That’s exactly why they’re coming after me now.
This attack ad comes on top of reports saying that our race in New Mexico is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans. They're gearing up to spend MILLIONS to buy this seat and bring their extremist agenda into our state — _all because they know governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power._
And now, they've launched a massive smear campaign on the airwaves because it's the only way they think they can win. But with our rights, freedoms, and communities on the line, I refuse to back down without a fight.
That's why my team and I just set a $15,000 rapid-response goal to ensure we have the money to fight back against these lies, and I'm personally asking for your grassroots support to help us reach it before midnight tonight.
**[Will you please rush a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots now to help me fight back, win in November, and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103107?refcode=em20260426-10349&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10349%2E614464%2EhzqDj2)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103107?refcode=em20260426-10349&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=10349%2E614464%2EhzqDj2)**
Be fierce,
Deb

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=5&akid=10349%2E614464%2EhzqDj2). name: Jasmine Clark
subject: REPORT: House Republicans flee Congress in record numbers amid growing dysfunction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260426-gopfleeing [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260426-gopfleeing]
Something big is happening in Washington right now.
House Republicans are heading for the exits — in record numbers.
More than three dozen GOP members of Congress have already announced they’re leaving — the highest number in modern history.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260426-gopfleeing [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260426-gopfleeing]
It’s not hard to see why. Dysfunction, chaos, and gridlock mean that they can’t get anything done. They’re tired of the infighting. And they don’t want to be there anymore.
At a time when families are struggling with the cost of living, when public health is under attack, and when our democracy is being tested...
...The people in charge are walking away.
But when the other side is retreating and admitting the system isn’t working, that’s when we step up and build something better.
We don’t need more chaos in Washington. We need leaders who will follow facts and evidence, actually solve problems, and put people ahead of politics
That’s why I’m running for Congress. But to win, it takes resources, organizing, and a grassroots movement ready to seize this moment. So I’m asking you personally to chip in $10 or more today to help us seize this moment. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260426-gopfleeing]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260426-gopfleeing]
Republicans may be heading for the exits. But we’re just getting started.
Let’s go win this.
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

name: Mary Trump
subject: $10 = my Uncle's worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-ddf?refcode=250908_marytrump_openers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-ddf?refcode=250908_marytrump_openers]
The stakes of 2025 and 2026 couldn’t be higher. Republicans are already laying the groundwork for a full MAGA takeover — and they’re being bankrolled by billionaires and special interests who are willing to pour unlimited money into rigging the system.
That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund: to invest early in grassroots Democratic candidates who can’t be drowned out by dark money. Together with Resist Reclaim Rebuild, we’re building campaigns that are rooted in people power, not billionaire’s wealth.
Every flyer that gets printed, every ad that goes up, every volunteer that knocks on doors costs money. And without us, groups like Resist Reclaim Rebuild would be facing this fight alone.
But the truth is: we can only win if grassroots Democrats like you chip in today.
Can you split $10 between my Democracy Defense Fund and Resist Reclaim Rebuild so we can get this fight started now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-ddf?refcode=251007_mary_10]
DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT MAGA!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-ddf?refcode=251007_mary_10]
Thanks for helping us take the fight to MAGA — in every state, in every race, and in every community where democracy is on the line.
Dr. Mary L. Trump

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130216183/617008785/-1765601992?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2026-04-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU1YmRjNmQtYTY0MS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q5Ww9ylb88SlwGsTfQSMDuVp2nKlMz98JiAkRtjnNB0=)

Peter,

While David Trone is attempting to mislead the public with a highly questionable poll of only 154 respondents, I wanted to share _a real poll by a real pollster with a real sample._

Hart Research Associates polled 500 likely Democratic Primary voters and found exactly what we know: _it doesn’t matter how much of his personal fortune Trone pours into this campaign; the people see right through his tricks._

It’s clear voters want someone who delivers for them, not a billionaire who thinks he can use his money to fake polls and buy their support.

_**[Can I count on you to show David Trone the support our campaign has by contributing $10 to my campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130216184/617008786/-1765601992?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2026-04-26_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU1YmRjNmQtYTY0MS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q5Ww9ylb88SlwGsTfQSMDuVp2nKlMz98JiAkRtjnNB0=)**_
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130216185/617008787/1713030257?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2026-04-26_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU1YmRjNmQtYTY0MS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q5Ww9ylb88SlwGsTfQSMDuVp2nKlMz98JiAkRtjnNB0=)
---
This shows exactly the type of leader David Trone would be: spreading false information, attacking his fellow Democrats, and spending recklessly. I’m sure it won’t stop there.

**That’s exactly why this moment matters.**

Polling 12 points ahead doesn’t mean it’s time for us to slow down.**It means an emboldened Trone throwing more millions into propaganda, including more fake polling schemes.**

_**[Can you chip in $10 to our campaign to send Trone and his team a message that no amount of fake information will win them this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130216186/617008788/1713030257?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2026-04-26_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU1YmRjNmQtYTY0MS1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q5Ww9ylb88SlwGsTfQSMDuVp2nKlMz98JiAkRtjnNB0=)**_

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Kevin Warsh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
A Fed under Trump’s control creates more opportunities for Trump’s corruption.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2875%2E4032634%2EUufPlG)
---
This past week, I sat across from Kevin Warsh — Donald Trump's pick to run the Federal Reserve — and I asked him a simple question: Did Donald Trump lose the 2020 election? He couldn’t — or rather he wouldn't — answer that. This is the man Trump wants running our independent central bank. Donald Trump has made it clear that he does not want an independent Fed. In fact, he has said, and I quote, “anybody that disagrees with me will never be Fed Chairman.” Why try to end the independence of the Fed? Because Trump’s economic failures are causing him political problems, and he wants the Fed to use monetary policies to artificially juice the economy in the short term — and this is his last chance to do that before the November elections. Trump himself said interest rates will drop "when Kevin gets in." Not when the economy needs it. Not when the data supports it. When _his guy_ is in the chair. Those interest rates determine what you pay on your mortgage, your car loan, and your credit card. But Trump just wants his guy to use his power to manipulate the economy for political reasons. Trump having a sock puppet in charge of the Fed would also give him access to the Fed’s powerful authorities that could be used to enrich himself, his family, and his Wall Street buddies by granting special accounts to his family’s crypto company or bailouts to his friends on Wall Street if they get into trouble. In other words, a Fed under Trump’s control creates more opportunities for Trump’s corruption. So, no matter how “independent” this guy claims he might be as chair of the Fed, if he can’t even assert reality and directly say that Trump lost the 2020 election, can we believe him? No. Just as a cherry on top: He’s got more than $100 million in investments he has refused to disclose. I asked him if any of those investments were affiliated with the Trump family, Chinese-controlled companies, financing vehicles set up by Jeffrey Epstein, or someone whose whole business is betting on what the Fed will do. He also wouldn't answer that question. **Look, Kevin Warsh sucked up to Donald Trump just enough to snag his dream job. But the Senate has the power to deny him this position — and we should not be aiding and abetting Donald Trump's illegal takeover of the Fed by installing his chosen sock puppet.** [**We can keep up the pressure on this. Add your name if you agree that the Senate should not confirm Kevin Warsh to run the Federal Reserve.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-fedchair/?source=EW_EMZ30X_FED_ENG_20260425_F&t=8&akid=2875%2E4032634%2EUufPlG) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-fedchair/?source=EW_EMZ30X_FED_ENG_20260425_F&t=13&akid=2875%2E4032634%2EUufPlG)

Elizabeth

clean_body: A Fed under Trump’s control creates more opportunities for Trump’s corruption. | | | This past week, I sat across from Kevin Warsh — Donald Trump's pick to run the Federal Reserve — and I asked him a simple question: Did Donald Trump lose the 2020 election? He couldn’t — or rather he wouldn't — answer that. This is the man Trump wants running our independent central bank. Donald Trump has made it clear that he does not want an independent Fed. In fact, he has said, and I quote, “anybody that disagrees with me will never be Fed Chairman.” Why try to end the independence of the Fed? Because Trump’s economic failures are causing him political problems, and he wants the Fed to use monetary policies to artificially juice the economy in the short term — and this is his last chance to do that before the November elections. Trump himself said interest rates will drop "when Kevin gets in." Not when the economy needs it. Not when the data supports it. When his guy is in the chair. Those interest rates determine what you pay on your mortgage, your car loan, and your credit card. But Trump just wants his guy to use his power to manipulate the economy for political reasons. Trump having a sock puppet in charge of the Fed would also give him access to the Fed’s powerful authorities that could be used to enrich himself, his family, and his Wall Street buddies by granting special accounts to his family’s crypto company or bailouts to his friends on Wall Street if they get into trouble. In other words, a Fed under Trump’s control creates more opportunities for Trump’s corruption. So, no matter how “independent” this guy claims he might be as chair of the Fed, if he can’t even assert reality and directly say that Trump lost the 2020 election, can we believe him? No. Just as a cherry on top: He’s got more than $100 million in investments he has refused to disclose. I asked him if any of those investments were affiliated with the Trump family, Chinese-controlled companies, financing vehicles set up by Jeffrey Epstein, or someone whose whole business is betting on what the Fed will do. He also wouldn't answer that question. Look, Kevin Warsh sucked up to Donald Trump just enough to snag his dream job. But the Senate has the power to deny him this position — and we should not be aiding and abetting Donald Trump's illegal takeover of the Fed by installing his chosen sock puppet. | Thanks for being part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2026 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

| | Hey, Peter! A lot of the work I do in the Senate doesn’t always make front-page headlines. Some of the issues I spend the most time on are the kinds that quietly affect people — things like maternal health care access, protections for federal workers during shutdowns, and defending voting rights. They may be lesser-known, but they’re no less important. That’s why I wanted to check in with you today. I want to make sure I’m focusing on the issues that matter most to the people I represent, especially the ones that don’t always get the attention they deserve in Washington. So my team and I put together a quick **Lesser-Known Issues Survey** to hear directly from you. Your feedback helps guide the work I do in the Senate, and that’s why your perspective matters. name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: They charged him with a felony for stopping a riot
body:
Dear Patriot,
They charged a cop with a felony for stopping a riot. I am not making this up.
They want to lock him away for using **non-lethal bean bag rounds** against a violent mob that was blocking an interstate highway, hurling rocks at officers, and bringing Molotov cocktails to the party.
I have seen a lot in my years in law enforcement. I have seen politics poison the justice system. But what is being done to Officer Jeffrey Teng of Austin, Texas is one of the most shameless, stomach-turning betrayals of law enforcement I have ever witnessed.
** [It has to stop — and I need your help to stop it.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b7d61dec08bb4d13a873fd2375b595f5&_e=aC680zcttQDe-yUSE2VPQr6iWvV19MhKWb_CAxOhZIhxM55XfLdMwoRRm7eVWwQmU8o0UKphEdJHe-w5T7jFI7G4sVL-PADAWOVhL8pCnQtLvp4Xt9FHvAdN4dMTYJxjPg0EJtOh9a4aSHPNiooaCYRydu_CA8wuUtUC5Mu-yEM8M_Vy3YZmxGB09oOmQEznr1FtGImks_DolSkWdLQaZ18ez1pJQTRc8UZNIbMbwsojRnUOgY9SmecLbTQF_sv0up6gLNFKe1mBCn12BscxguXdlLJG7tiWWux7ip9z3iToEAuO40VjmJV550P0jnF56OaUihL9LB62mIX3ezHol-Xv76BEzG9yYnKgSTECP2LtEKx4X0yigEP0mO-_WYTHMGR-dZ5dPZhpR7fY8_YxnnKyqTFGaGdiKtcN289WL1PBKC99Lqbk_6NEj4cNVOrmidhiFoyaLC0QkROe5OIJr3l5gUoLbvscnymarD6Yi0RxO6BsSVMCxGTPmYyGJM5O99KvPeS7lTyv5fzWiGUsnV0fculFjSIZRa1FnYuG4WANpNVFlW2kjwv82i0E3-f45Cj7eu8t0PnaKk3F4s4BpV9gJ61yu8BzDuQCguPevyJlGy1stTqVEF2qi58prrBI) **
It was Memorial Day weekend, 2020. Hundreds of protesters flooded the streets of Austin. What started as a demonstration turned into three days of chaos: buildings looted, police vehicles set on fire, a rioter caught with a Molotov cocktail before he could throw it. It took nearly Austin's entire 2,100-officer police force to keep the city from total collapse.
On May 31st, a mob completely shut down I-35 — a major interstate highway — directly in front of police headquarters. Ambulances couldn't get through. Officers gave verbal orders to disperse. A police helicopter broadcast commands over a loudspeaker. The rioters refused.
**Officer Jeffrey Teng and his partner were ordered in to clear the highway.**
Officer Jeffrey Teng with his wife
When they arrived, the mob started throwing rocks. One of those rocks struck Officer Teng's partner square in the chest. Under attack, outnumbered, doing their jobs — Teng and his fellow officers deployed non-lethal rounds to stop the violence.
That's it. That's the "crime."
Now Jeffrey Teng, along with 4 other Austin police officers, faces felony charges. Meanwhile, District Attorney José Garza has dismissed nearly every charge against the actual rioters. The people who threw rocks, set cars on fire, and shut down a highway walk free. The officers who stopped them are being prosecuted.
This is a political vendetta by a DA who has made it his mission to destroy the men and women who keep order in our streets.
And Jeff Teng is paying the price. His career is on hold. His future is uncertain. His trial has been delayed again and again — meaning this family has been living under this cloud for _years_ with no end in sight.
The National Center for Police Defense is standing with Jeff and his family — funding his legal defense and providing support while this ordeal drags on. But we cannot do it without you.
I'm asking you to [ **donate today** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b7d61dec08bb4d13a873fd2375b595f5&_e=aC680zcttQDe-yUSE2VPQr6iWvV19MhKWb_CAxOhZIhxM55XfLdMwoRRm7eVWwQmU8o0UKphEdJHe-w5T7jFI7G4sVL-PADAWOVhL8pCnQtLvp4Xt9FHvAdN4dMTYJxjPg0EJtOh9a4aSHPNiooaCYRydu_CA8wuUtUC5Mu-yEM8M_Vy3YZmxGB09oOmQEznr1FtGImks_DolSkWdLQaZ695VYS7NRdTMgBIP4tMO7Vez1OzVtjZdXvYCoscr8yDFi4aJibCEC6Z_ei-fR_OJ_GTc6PiOaWS-PDrrxtQrrL0mEDL2iPROfxNbGFn5-s4XeWBD4ajmnZ10PTVlcyg61OKCaHO7Y9Z-ZkSa_75nmvbyVsEvOd5fM1Ht7zymM6JJmyP2Qml1QSP7ZqzAomqaYQ_Fl2sSC9fz5VpOynLILIIDnjMFNMcno8zNgb0s2AYAIC27FIKyCNecIUvPWN8QP1etCJecr9k_oRjagCBGwfBUpJ0EZ87rjDau6TeBpAJc_WdG3xYRkUKAAY5ncOPMGeNt44ER1ieJb8rf_n0mlu56ZAMH2CA9qSKGjCMkfiv8J-dKio39P32CXMPlfSqgezELctAlBcPatid0D-u86a2zU6qukUJmn4FlvJf1Awj). $25. $50. $100. clean_body: Dear Patriot, They charged a cop with a felony for stopping a riot. I am not making this up. They want to lock him away for using non-lethal bean bag rounds against a violent mob that was blocking an interstate highway, hurling rocks at officers, and bringing Molotov cocktails to the party. I have seen a lot in my years in law enforcement. I have seen politics poison the justice system. But what is being done to Officer Jeffrey Teng of Austin, Texas is one of the most shameless, stomach-turning betrayals of law enforcement I have ever witnessed. It was Memorial Day weekend, 2020. Hundreds of protesters flooded the streets of Austin. What started as a demonstration turned into three days of chaos: buildings looted, police vehicles set on fire, a rioter caught with a Molotov cocktail before he could throw it. It took nearly Austin's entire 2,100-officer police force to keep the city from total collapse. On May 31st, a mob completely shut down I-35 — a major interstate highway — directly in front of police headquarters. Ambulances couldn't get through. Officers gave verbal orders to disperse. A police helicopter broadcast commands over a loudspeaker. The rioters refused. Officer Jeffrey Teng and his partner were ordered in to clear the highway. Officer Jeffrey Teng with his wife When they arrived, the mob started throwing rocks. One of those rocks struck Officer Teng's partner square in the chest. Under attack, outnumbered, doing their jobs — Teng and his fellow officers deployed non-lethal rounds to stop the violence. That's it. That's the "crime." Now Jeffrey Teng, along with 4 other Austin police officers, faces felony charges. Meanwhile, District Attorney José Garza has dismissed nearly every charge against the actual rioters. The people who threw rocks, set cars on fire, and shut down a highway walk free. The officers who stopped them are being prosecuted. This is a political vendetta by a DA who has made it his mission to destroy the men and women who keep order in our streets. And Jeff Teng is paying the price. His career is on hold. His future is uncertain. His trial has been delayed again and again — meaning this family has been living under this cloud for years with no end in sight. The National Center for Police Defense is standing with Jeff and his family — funding his legal defense and providing support while this ordeal drags on. But we cannot do it without you. I'm asking you to . $25. $50. $100. Whatever you can. Your gift goes to Jeff's defense and to supporting his family through this nightmare. Stand With Officer Teng Today Your gift funds Jeff's legal defense and supports his family through this nightmare. 100% of your donation goes toward Officer Teng's legal defense fund. The radical left is counting on your silence. They want you to think this is just one officer, one city, one story. It isn't. If they can prosecute 20+ officers for stopping a riot with non-lethal force, no officer anywhere is safe. Jeff Teng showed up. He held the line. He protected his partner, his city, and the rule of law — with every tool he was authorized to use. The least we can do is show up for him. Don't look away. Share this with every law enforcement supporter you know. And please, For Jeff. For every officer they're coming after next. Sincerely, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County, Arizona Honorary Supporter, National Center for Police Defense P.S. Officer Jeff Teng is facing felony charges for stopping a riot. If this DA gets away with it, it sets a precedent that will haunt law enforcement across this entire country. — before another good cop's life gets destroyed. Don't Wait — Jeff Needs You Now Your gift to his legal defense. National Center for Police Defense**

name: Sam with Molder for Congress
subject: Lessons from Dolly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
And it's not just the music.

| | | | |
---
Peter, Sam here, Chaz’s Political Director. There's a reason everybody loves Dolly Parton. Born and raised in Nashville, I've been a fan my whole life. And honestly, I don't know many people who aren't, Tennessean or not. It's not just her music, although that doesn't hurt. It's that she's been one of the most famous people in the world for decades, and she's never once pretended to be something she's not. She's from Tennessee, she's proud of it, and no amount of fame ever made her forget where she came from or who she came up with. She built a nationwide reading program that's given over 200 million books to kids. She's put money back into the communities that raised her. And she's done all of it without ever making it about politics or picking sides. People across the spectrum love her because she leads with generosity, humility, and heart. She doesn't divide people. She brings them together. I think about that a lot when I think about why I came to work on this campaign. Because Chaz reminds me of that same spirit. He's never left the town he grew up in. He's been the Mayor for almost 8 years, giving back to the community that shaped him. He doesn't try to be the loudest voice or have the most controversial take. He does the work and treats people the way they deserve to be treated, regardless of where they stand politically. Tennessee already knows what good leadership looks like. They've been watching it their whole lives. Now it's time to send some of that to Washington. ### About Chaz Molder
Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. clean_body: And it's not just the music. | | | | | Peter, Sam here, Chaz’s Political Director. There's a reason everybody loves Dolly Parton. Born and raised in Nashville, I've been a fan my whole life. And honestly, I don't know many people who aren't, Tennessean or not. It's not just her music, although that doesn't hurt. It's that she's been one of the most famous people in the world for decades, and she's never once pretended to be something she's not. She's from Tennessee, she's proud of it, and no amount of fame ever made her forget where she came from or who she came up with. She built a nationwide reading program that's given over 200 million books to kids. She's put money back into the communities that raised her. And she's done all of it without ever making it about politics or picking sides. People across the spectrum love her because she leads with generosity, humility, and heart. She doesn't divide people. She brings them together. I think about that a lot when I think about why I came to work on this campaign. Because Chaz reminds me of that same spirit. He's never left the town he grew up in. He's been the Mayor for almost 8 years, giving back to the community that shaped him. He doesn't try to be the loudest voice or have the most controversial take. He does the work and treats people the way they deserve to be treated, regardless of where they stand politically. Tennessee already knows what good leadership looks like. They've been watching it their whole lives. Now it's time to send some of that to Washington. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | Dolly would never say it, but we will: TN-5 deserves better than what it's getting right now. And we think Chaz is the person to fix that. — Sam Williams Political Director, Molder for Congress | | ---|---|--- About Chaz Molder Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | | ~~ Click~~ to receive fewer emails. Follow Chaz | ~ | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Molder for Congress Molder for CongressPO Box 1468Columbia, TN 38402United States www.chazmolder.com "Website"

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header]

Hi team,

Right now, there's only one open toss-up seat in the entire country, and it’s right here at home. But what happens in this race won't stay in this race. It will set the tone for every competitive contest on the map this cycle.

When we continue building momentum here, we send a clear signal to every campaign, every candidate, and every voter still making up their mind: This isn't just about one district ready for change. It's about a country that is fed up with Republicans and Trump working for the wealthy and powerful while leaving them to struggle to afford food and gas. It’s about a true blue wave.

A strong showing here is like the first domino that sends the rest tumbling. But we can't win this on our own. Will you chip in $25 right now to help us kick-start America’s next blue wave? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=260426_tm_wave_l1&amount=25]

Give $25 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260426_tm_wave] Give $50 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260426_tm_wave]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately.

The eyes of the country are on this seat. Let's give them something to see.

— Team Marlene
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106088/images/Marlene.png]

About Marlene Galan-Woods
Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress.

**Today, Social Security provides benefits to nearly 69 million Americans each month. It’s a lifeline for millions of seniors and families, with support that has long crossed party lines — but right now, it’s facing its biggest threat ever.**

New Dems are fighting back in Congress to protect and strengthen the benefits Americans have earned through a lifetime of hard work.

And across the country, we’re building a grassroots movement defending Social Security for current and future generations.

clean_body: We just need 1,000 more Democrats on board today. | | The GOP has cut Social Security staffing by nearly 11%, leading to longer wait times and reduced access at SSA offices across the country. Today, Social Security provides benefits to nearly 69 million Americans each month. It’s a lifeline for millions of seniors and families, with support that has long crossed party lines — but right now, it’s facing its biggest threat ever. New Dems are fighting back in Congress to protect and strengthen the benefits Americans have earned through a lifetime of hard work. And across the country, we’re building a grassroots movement defending Social Security for current and future generations. Do you have a second, friend? Here's where the race stands in New Mexico:
**First** , I recently launched my first TV ad to share my vision for a brighter New Mexico. On day one, I will start working on giving New Mexicans a raise, helping our children read earlier and learn outside the classroom, making our communities safer, cutting costs, and recruiting healthcare professionals to ensure you can see a doctor _even_ when you’re not sick.
**Then** , my opponent started launching attack ads against me, blanketing the airwaves with lies and misinformation.
**Now, early voting is just around the corner,** and MAGA Republicans are funneling money into New Mexico to try and buy this seat.
**That’s why my team and I set an urgent $15,000 weekly fundraising goal, and I’m counting on you to help me close the gap before our midnight deadline.
**

name: Amanda for Colorado
subject: We just earned a big endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda for Colorado
body:
| | | Hi Peter, I’ve got some exciting news to share: Our campaign has officially been endorsed by **Our Revolution** —the grassroots movement founded by Bernie Sanders to take on corporate power and build a government that works for all of us. This endorsement means a lot. Our Revolution represents thousands of organizers and everyday people who are done with politics as usual. They’re fighting to elect leaders who will stand up to billionaires, expand voting rights, and actually deliver for working people. That’s exactly what this campaign is about. They endorsed us because they know we have the experience to protect our elections and the backbone to stand up to anyone trying to undermine them. **But here’s the truth: endorsements don’t win elections. People do.** If we’re going to build the kind of campaign that can win statewide, and take on the forces trying to roll back our rights, we need your help right now.
**Can you chip in[$10, $25, or whatever you can today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqum6oshDjP8NRpbzhRH5VoG3mvJk5rCXNoRDVMkcAX5pV7ZFrQqezoFZl3QaegyLxgcCvzziH18ynJz8DsQVc0ehAKb2msCQ3ut9R09x8rYRHzBQvnJiY4tX8HMBQUJ9G1x0xIKxbwScCGK-GDTEvqUS9_DdAPq1oNKU4aG1AauM4QSDUuCIJT-bHvsJ3FDC0BqriInlHsUDH_Z9-kJxcI_9TiinO6XBaZ82L0ttOml7yT9c4CgfTqe053dEljFtjaTT2DzM6KsAEyuUu1cjEPxFuBq45CsBlwpKtX18nNPjOtEzZcxDNeUDVPJ0sLEJnE/4q4/r6HjXpXrTAmrhd9K_tUcdQ/h0/h001.1v-wpdfk9RcpKuwL_5A9a5-YLteJX3rlq0KVhZ4-o9U) to help us build on this momentum?** [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqum6oshDjP8NRpbzhRH5VoG3mvJk5rCXNoRDVMkcAX5pd_x2ivzmLauZSmmVP17HHWGFI5EUo8t6A9hPXhn9ZDrdb98oFJp7n9M08MkAWAmI6MsOnengHvw5pb84vP3pCwtITOKzQcFNORzlZZYEb2EOnx19Ba9Mw9xJ6DDbyhZepZsmHW2CX5KGB8A4ajHauqIPYeWvyaH_mLlgevp6ocpgAFGfTrQ0L7lxDlLG100IRlRo6K0KoOslUXQZakUb6-X457fDv59oRcJKd-QbA3WPL-qpwzLtUX4xdjlCUTWtruU6DxGFlbQr13mW8b_iR4/4q4/r6HjXpXrTAmrhd9K_tUcdQ/h1/h001.YkLT9dQDvS0rixwRR6j3U-Kq9SmC5hOVISxYIPmEJgw)
Every dollar helps us reach more voters, organize in more communities, and continue proving that this campaign is powered by people—not corporate interests. We’re building something real here. And I’m so grateful to have you in this with me. Let’s keep it going. Amanda Gonzalez Candidate for Secretary of State

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I’ve got some exciting news to share: Our campaign has officially been endorsed by Our Revolution —the grassroots movement founded by Bernie Sanders to take on corporate power and build a government that works for all of us. This endorsement means a lot. Our Revolution represents thousands of organizers and everyday people who are done with politics as usual. They’re fighting to elect leaders who will stand up to billionaires, expand voting rights, and actually deliver for working people. That’s exactly what this campaign is about. They endorsed us because they know we have the experience to protect our elections and the backbone to stand up to anyone trying to undermine them. But here’s the truth: endorsements don’t win elections. People do. If we’re going to build the kind of campaign that can win statewide, and take on the forces trying to roll back our rights, we need your help right now. Can you chip in to help us build on this momentum? Every dollar helps us reach more voters, organize in more communities, and continue proving that this campaign is powered by people—not corporate interests. We’re building something real here. And I’m so grateful to have you in this with me. Let’s keep it going. Amanda Gonzalez Candidate for Secretary of State Paid for by Amanda for Colorado. Registered Agent Ashton Narzisi | | Sent via . name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: I have to tell you something urgent...
body:
We’ve built a foothold. Now what? | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9138c1a26a244ab094120933a1e8ad53&_e=wRbZTlYhGPh1DbGISmwXxLbbPsJuFXR_-o3KGhm6ofbcT1R8vb2z0QC-FrJexOTf1QRbuhYRMFoQDIzpnOMixqJUX4D-uooJ5iIK0hb7xdlCS6HpNFsai_obelc5_Ck5Ci9HspZpYfXNjVxlPQkYBEoYIFxYJN4ux_D1hEUVUta3DeHV3vxx3T9ld2pAhlo0RuJVCvxVIpEBvtu_7benNeW7bLra2-0RiuK_6j8yesufRmYJYUeifYx4tyrA7b60xrBFFag8cIvDGUH8TtzU03EgS392oIY6zLWZoVyiXgjTTSTE06tgFlo44Upwyd8ZK4TVIVDZ6puLkMEiJUa22To7JUYDxsYp29Az9jv61akPZeLssn9fs9fvOCscXlAf606G3Vr9QD6IVQTEiHAKDPISZBCXT7-zev6FMaebVSKngisgQNhRAihU7PzQLn2NCuhqBdw_KuSUxg63oBxuHIWOztclDWwmym33AvfIAxVu2UeznLeqyAyZDl6TtHEBN1E5Jku8xVO0vRniROA1aI5lIY_8OkdlspttObzEVKjSmh9MRRsUvtuO2BEI7gyN5U73DXIS4r9cv8ngSheVBu2i0MamaCW3ns5RZ0qIKvt0tiheqWzpNaHBHv_nCV9AL10WUUaSZVuG-YBpe_CfyJvmZ83MuI77kCOl5NozB74an1H5De-7LmMUphswAUtVY1L4s7cwkYQSmkhD-dy0Lw%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,
---
I'm going to be blunt with you.

We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit.

Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way."

Right now.

And the scariest part?

It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms.

High schools. Colleges.

Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped.

If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: _" What happened to this country?" _

You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly.

Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything...

The other side is doing something far more dangerous.

They're raising the next generation.

Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places.

That's how countries are lost.

Slowly. Then all at once.

But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope...

There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged.

_And it shouldn 't even exist. _

**Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.**
That alone felt like a miracle.

Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have.

Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down.

And yet...

_They stepped up anyway. _

About that time, Charlie called me.

He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent.

"Andrew, we've got to move faster."

I told him we were. He stopped me.

"No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I actually laughed.

"Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said. "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000."

I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools.

We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet.

But Charlie wasn't fazed.

_" We'll figure it out." _

That was him.

He didn't wait for perfect conditions.

Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... _we lose everything. _

And now?

Less than a year later...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9138c1a26a244ab094120933a1e8ad53&_e=wRbZTlYhGPh1DbGISmwXxLbbPsJuFXR_-o3KGhm6ofbcT1R8vb2z0QC-FrJexOTf1QRbuhYRMFoQDIzpnOMixqJUX4D-uooJ5iIK0hb7xdlCS6HpNFsai_obelc5_Ck5Ci9HspZpYfXNjVxlPQkYBEoYIFxYJN4ux_D1hEUVUta3DeHV3vxx3T9ld2pAhlo0RuJVCvxVIpEBvtu_7benNeW7bLra2-0RiuK_6j8yesufRmYJYUeifYx4tyrA7b60AV_uhH6tyoSGi_z9BobHOeatuNK3RjeXlXsxRV6QEyWbsNTJqJeIi3Et5V8U3aM5FrbZ2dSdCwTI57SPTE1BQDp7DANl7mzxexB0H_8qUJfHHudJnnFCTC6KPIoU3b-mOKwXTK6gKvPOk6Mawd1RhmtKByMCO2Q4ZPEyomplUO39JUnVNjOBw-4k1w27aHOkE_r-pLxRZecKJPgjBOQKSsV6D5UYi7wxQGyevyYGsrWyl0z0cg5dJnE7Omsv-8DNQt2T8sRKVdvOU3WCMg8NPY1yIlYy_3E8OivRQFTSf8aipeYHKV9YLGskMpWHJ4bPzfdbtujQqGegykc-VVDHiMkt7obCxBefm0zqluFPprZEQLyFTa3JE9d9YZftbXfNLq91a1kzF-5kbvzVEjx3H2giGxKsNffTfaGiWY19M8h30lllTHHc52snART_NKe30ImiV59a7P9LudcB2VO1zg%3D%3D)
---
**We 're in 3,300 schools. **

**Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. **

**Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. **

_That shouldn 't be possible. _

Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day.

And yet... it's still happening.

_But Peter, here 's the part you need to understand: _

This is not a victory. It's a foothold.

_Because in the other 87% of schools? _

There is no resistance. None.

Just one-sided propaganda from the Left.

One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them.

That's the reality.

The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are.

The question is whether it's enough.

Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America...

They're not the majority. _They 're the exception. _

They're the ones willing to take the heat.

The ones willing to stand alone.

The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: _" I love this country." _
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9138c1a26a244ab094120933a1e8ad53&_e=wRbZTlYhGPh1DbGISmwXxLbbPsJuFXR_-o3KGhm6ofbcT1R8vb2z0QC-FrJexOTf1QRbuhYRMFoQDIzpnOMixqJUX4D-uooJ5iIK0hb7xdlCS6HpNFsai_obelc5_Ck5Ci9HspZpYfXNjVxlPQkYBEoYIFxYJN4ux_D1hEUVUta3DeHV3vxx3T9ld2pAhlo0RuJVCvxVIpEBvtu_7benNeW7bLra2-0RiuK_6j8yesufRmYJYUeifYx4tyrA7b60L4yY2qkU8Cuj-PQO6K3pWt-vOhgaQxa7mMkIXbstSOma9SJiKnEZl6jnNu8UZbFOyjTbKH9ga9LBHwQokuuMdOiwiXC626H438NCi_ricz-tje1S5vp7JXZhKJFQgnpYy6lsSSUhoiArtqPOJRR0I5qghYib1yldvnbxeh8Fx8RDlnN5ZfoqUgm4f-mJLKyfO5wpqccMx3MXIw4XKVGWmVCu96r_PGDIvhO3_lX7En3btlO36SR1hxrXeeoK2f9uprmNQbU5ggUAQ_Ex-YZuL2gwFJIKGFM-LSmdxdzo5hie7BxVPBZyiNJ3z8HrG0dxvvxV_c9PtoLipuGKzOkwAzW39h3jt6LtTflqB8O172rqhctMlTCjUdRIYhWr9SD8kuCSi-xUXhioWSBqvoYXwFbV2F9OLZvBvB0hEzblfj3RkiBHBzSbGW38L38JtgxvCEbcQlibVB_EzFWb2Q83_Q%3D%3D)
---
And every time one of those students raises their hand...

We have a choice.

Back them. _Or leave them on their own. _

**Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. **

Everything they need to actually stand their ground.

Not symbolically. For real.

They've already made the decision to lead.

All they're waiting on... is you and me.

**Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. **

$25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school.

$25 to put real tools in their hands.

$25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time.

**[And Peter, I’m asking you to send backup to these brave students on the frontlines with your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9138c1a26a244ab094120933a1e8ad53&_e=wRbZTlYhGPh1DbGISmwXxLbbPsJuFXR_-o3KGhm6ofbcT1R8vb2z0QC-FrJexOTf1QRbuhYRMFoQDIzpnOMixqJUX4D-uooJ5iIK0hb7xdlCS6HpNFsai_obelc5_Ck5Ci9HspZpYfXNjVxlPQkYBEoYIFxYJN4ux_D1hEUVUta3DeHV3vxx3T9ld2pAhlo0RuJVCvxVIpEBvtu_7benNeW7bLra2-0RiuK_6j8yesufRmYJYUeifYx4tyrA7b60_rthX5aa7263-2CMtHLnlel-on2twe8LVWZneiG29LmPx8UvFOblVfSSS5yCDheWVaFHes1JadsWGA6tft0OfhY0cwxcb4TEcfiEbAAetFHBhoFotVGuFrBzGlncSnnCnlJYT3PIpLqlaC7Wtz00C9EZalANpkHfW4HEeCZ3XROo70xfs7QJLmCb5JwOLiSjro_bBVoxqmhNgq5dfkHeez--P9QRdzZkO9lu3vd80mD5oLjCs-gKFqbtWHgs0EiMK8hmeGqHH7gx2kzPSuKN4V_Qc53uxja4Wrl7zHUIhR8KZb28LgnFdrsEulo-LnbjnkgsrD0Ddu4UR6e-dJbkrJ9VHOAvnEjI4icpXN9XMuWRz_VqVjCvCRCYaz_zF3UvyfncaWLYh7X2m7CV7t4E7ttFJ_Yc9EZmU7Xlda_GxEhQ4LAn5-AYDWmLFLHa3PevqAarFLndiHjZIwnICAvM7g%3D%3D)**

---
But here's what gives me hope, Peter...

Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating.

Because every day, more students are stepping forward.

Not because it's easy or popular...

_But because they know what 's at stake. _

They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to.

They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged.

They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform.

And they're not alone.

They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day.

They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending.
---

That's how movements are built.

Not from the top down... _But from the ground up. _

One student. One school. One chapter at a time.

And Peter -- that's exactly how we take this country back.

But only if we move fast enough.

Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break.

They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in.

And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction...

Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes.

And once it closes... It closes for good.

That's what's at stake.

Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- _while it still matters. _

**[Please act today and send an activism kit straight to the frontlines.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9138c1a26a244ab094120933a1e8ad53&_e=wRbZTlYhGPh1DbGISmwXxLbbPsJuFXR_-o3KGhm6ofbcT1R8vb2z0QC-FrJexOTf1QRbuhYRMFoQDIzpnOMixqJUX4D-uooJ5iIK0hb7xdlCS6HpNFsai_obelc5_Ck5Ci9HspZpYfXNjVxlPQkYBEoYIFxYJN4ux_D1hEUVUta3DeHV3vxx3T9ld2pAhlo0RuJVCvxVIpEBvtu_7benNeW7bLra2-0RiuK_6j8yesufRmYJYUeifYx4tyrA7b60OVw8ykMp0CiPYCmcuIHeYqx_hCe0aShzJj-wMSCN47xEBQFmo7KUSRy9DPtsh4OEigNjbvBdDj6aN9H8NhBE8qOzEOfgLf1RqfNtK5jsic8wcHZM7_uvkut65Y6l2MRtQP8KfnpkQ0W0KHJ9ogO06GySKGhb0Z8mIcvF9dmXDy5vwmxkxIEQNIDI-wjKGCmtYaQ9kIIf4cMVLPdaq8nH7ZucTynkteqrSmXXVE8WNRGStebscRP7mHX5EaS0pPaZzi5_-SEUih1Vwv097RpNlSp8zHvmQx8jEL6ykaz7r9KmCIBnrpagncMS4wpoLCeb0BeqtGgHytrU0_MNN4_rVezS6k8uPXTFsfbuEZwYj96NuqjIFrxW1bEZYm0WnQefjr8BZBhHoO1kJGMIY8jEYGytBz3jwHP1WfmHgK4ccMx6DFfOKXFJmmnRUV2DFhYbVZCLotAGYz5JZ87diAhfbA%3D%3D)**
